Everyone immediately accepted these tools with great gratitude.

Wang Liang, head of the Publicity Department of the student council, stood in bewildered amazement, wondering if the young man in front of him was telling the truth or just talking big.

“Wang Liang, do you think what he’s saying is true?”

At this moment, a girl who had been silent on the side suddenly said, “I don’t know why, I keep thinking that this schoolmate of ours is a little... Unreliable...”

“Let’s wait and see...”

Wang Liang replied in a low voice.

The girl nodded and stopped talking.

At this moment, Chen Chen, who was standing deep in the shadows of the corridor, also witnessed all of this. The corners of his mouth could not help but twitch because Chen Chen had known from the start that everything mentioned by this young man named Zhang Wei came from a game.

An online game called Phasmophobia.

In other words, this seemingly explosive jargon that the young man kept bringing up was nothing but bluffing...

Still, Chen Chen did not bother to reveal all this. At this time, he just about understood that he seemed to have fallen into a trap. Just like with the previous antimeme, the former owner of the USB drive had set another trap for him.

However, whether this trap was laid by Wang Xi or Zhao Shanhe was a matter to be determined.

Chen Chen seemed to have seen Professor Wang Xi’s body earlier. If Zhao Shanhe laid the trap, then it would make sense. He killed Professor Wang Xi and lured Chen Chen to trace the antimeme here. There would be a high probability of Chen Chen triggering the mechanism and trapping himself here.

Nonetheless, Chen Chen clearly remembered that Zhao Shanhe was dead. He had turned into an antimeme and even wanted to target Chen Chen, but was instead killed by Chen Chen in the hypnotized dream world.

However, if it were not Zhao Shanhe, who would it be?

Chen Chen slowly turned his head. At this moment, the corridor had completely lost all light and became pitch black but in the darkness, Chen Chen could hear the sound of water again.

Still, this was different from ordinary water. This kind of water sounded extremely viscous as if it was a jelly substance that constantly gurgled.

What Chen Chen did not know was that at this time, out of his sight, blood had flooded the entire server room from the crack that was opened. It was as if a tide of blood had filled the room.

chapters.title: Chapter 437: The Otherworld
chapters.body:
Chapter 437: The Otherworld

Chapter 437: The Otherworld

From the blood pool that was only a few centimeters deep, suddenly, a human hand with sharp nails stretched out, and then a second, a third, a fourth...

At last, a woman with four arms and disheveled hair crawled out of the pool of blood slowly. Her hair had covered her face. She suddenly scuttled forward in the dim environment and rapidly clambered onto the wall. There, she unleashed an ear-piercing scream and she crawled into the darkness like a gecko...

This scream ran through the corridor and echoed directly in the ears of Chen Chen and the many students next to the elevator. These students seemed to be rather on edge and many people screamed subconsciously.

“What’s that sound? It sounds like a woman’s scream but also like the sound of scraping glass, but in reality, it’s more terrifying than any of these!”

Someone was startled and asked in fright.

“Maybe it’s your mother calling you to go home for dinner.”

Zhang Wei glanced at that person as if they were an idiot as he retorted.

“Surely, surely not, I’m wondering if it’s a ghost...”

That student stammered.

“Why are you asking if you already know? Why don’t you quickly light your candle?”

Zhang Wei looked at his flashlight nervously and then said confidently, “Don’t panic, the flashlight in my hand hasn’t flickered yet, which means the ghost hasn’t yet entered the hunting phase. We’re safe! If it enters the hunting phase, we only need to each find a room to hide in and anyway, there are so many rooms here!”

“But the doors of these rooms are locked...”

Someone said feebly.

“F*ck?”

Zhang Wei was suddenly at a loss. He had forgotten about that.

Currently, Chen Chen, who was standing in the dark, also heard this sound.

“The sound came from the location of the server room. In other words, it was a trap in there...”

Chen Chen thought silently. He tried to contact Little X but found that the signal had been interrupted long ago. After he witnessed the elevator directly falling into an abyss, it was obvious that they were no longer underground in the previous building, but had been drawn into a peculiar space.

Although he was no longer the same person he used to be, Chen Chen was not so arrogant as to run into danger headfirst. Whether it was the T-virus he was infected with, which was comparable to the strength of a weakened U.S. military team or his Field energy that could withstand bullets, they could only deal with conventional situations. If it was a supernatural situation like this, these powers had no effect at all.

Everything he had experienced up until now had gone beyond reality and was more like a weapon created by a meme...

In other words, Zhao Shanhe or another person behind the scenes had a set of memetic technology that was almost fully mature, which could induce the memetic effect to produce such complicated tricks?

This thought occurred to Chen Chen but in the next second, it was immediately rejected by him.

No, impossible!

If this was the case, then why should the other person be so sneaky? Would it not be grand to kill Chen Chen directly and take the USB drive away?

After all, if Chen Chen was faced with developed memetic technology, he would be powerless to fight back.

Thus, if that was not the case, what was this meme, which could draw him and everyone on this floor into a strange space?

Could it be...

Suddenly, a spark went off in Chen Chen’s mind and a possibility came to his mind.

“Could it be that? But how is that possible... How can the USB flash drive accept such a movie...”

Chen Chen was a little surprised but then he thought about it. “If this is the case, then I should mix in with the crowd first. I’ll see what happens then...”

Thinking of this, Chen Chen heard a whispering sound behind him as if something was slowly approaching. Therefore, he stopped hesitating and walked directly in the direction of the rest.

Chen Chen’s footsteps sounded from the darkness. Hearing this sound, everyone turned their heads like frightened birds, staring at the darkness. Several female classmates screamed at once and shrank behind Zhang Wei.

Zhang Wei also jumped in fright, but when he thought of the crucifix in his hand and the performance that he was putting on, he gradually gained a trace of confidence. He asked loudly, “Who is sneaking around there? I, Zhang Wei, ask you to come out!”

“It’s me.”

Chen Chen walked out of the darkness. He looked at Zhang Wei and a glimmer of puzzlement and helplessness appeared in his eyes.

This was not because of the lanky young man’s boastful pretense from beginning to end, but because of his voice. If Chen Chen remembered correctly, he had heard it in Dorm 404 before.

The owner of that voice had also been called Zhang Wei.

Did this mean that this guy had followed him here? How excellent!

Chen Chen twitched the corners of his mouth. He did not expect that his marvelous self, an amalgamation of “Alice” and “Andrew”, would one day be tracked by an ordinary person, without him noticing it at that.

“So, it’s you!”

Putting aside the jumble of thoughts in Chen Chen’s mind at this time, when Zhang Wei saw Chen Chen’s face, he also gasped, apparently recognizing the figure from the surveillance feed. “You eavesdropped on the conversation in our dormitory before and you’re a pervert with a door fetish?”

“Door fetish?”

Chen Chen gaped and understood that he would not have any meaningful exchange with such a person. He immediately changed the subject wisely. “I just heard a scream coming from the end of the corridor. Something seems to be approaching us from the dark. If you don’t want to die, I suggest we come up with a plan as soon as possible...”

There was a mad scramble after everyone heard this.

“Don’t panic, everyone!”

Zhang Wei said loudly and at the same time, looked at Chen Chen vigilantly. “Ordinary people may have been fooled by you at once, but I, Zhang Wei, am different. I’ve already discovered a huge flaw in your words!”

With that said, Zhang Wei could not help but sneer. “You said something was approaching in the dark, then why did you stay in the dark just now? Did you make the scream? You’re a ghost!”

As soon as he said these words, everyone’s expressions changed again and their eyes turned to Chen Chen with a flash of fear and horror.

Chen Chen frowned and had to say, “I’m human, not a ghost.”

“Oh, no?”

Zhang Wei thought for a while, then simply held up the crucifix. “If you’re not a ghost, would you dare to look directly at the crucifix?”

As he said, he moved toward Chen Chen step by step. At the same time, when everyone was still behind him, he surreptitiously put his left hand into his crotch, took it out, and quickly smeared something on the crucifix.

“What the f*ck are you doing?”

Chen Chen’s scalp turned numb and he quickly leaped back.

“Haha, you’ve been exposed. You’re a ghost indeed!”

Seeing this, Zhang Wei laughed coldly. He moved back directly and jumped back in front of everyone. “You’re not afraid of the crucifix, but you’re afraid of the urine of young boys! You’re indeed a ghost and you’re a Chinese ghost who doesn’t believe in God!”

Everyone was shocked. They looked at the wet crucifix in Zhang Wei’s hand and his wet crotch. Some girls who had been hiding behind Zhang Wei trustingly suddenly turned blank and looked at them both in bewilderment.

The rest of the people wore a baffled look on their faces and suddenly felt that the lanky young man in front of them seemed a little unreliable...

However, just as the situation gradually became awkward, there was another spine-tingling scream from the depths of the corridor. At the same time, a rustling sound could be heard, like the sound of something crawling.

After hearing this sound, the crowd suddenly screamed again and everyone kept rushing toward the stairs and elevator entrance at the end of the corridor.

At this time, Chen Chen’s eyes had taken on a serious gaze. He turned his head abruptly and the surrounding Field tightly enveloped him.

The flashlight in Zhang Wei’s hand instinctively pointed behind Chen Chen but he happened to see that on the ceiling of the corridor, a red figure was darting past!

In the gloom, he could even make out that it was a woman with long hair...

“Ahh!”

The group erupted into another screech. This time, everyone was fully convinced that ghosts were real.

“Heh heh, it’s just trying to scare us to lower our sanity level. Don’t fall for it...”

Zhang Wei twitched his mouth stiffly and said with a forced smile.

“You say that, but why are you trembling?”

A young man on the side asked shakily because everyone could see that Zhang Wei was shaking more than everyone at this point. Even the beam of the flashlight in his hand was quaking rapidly...

Chen Chen had been paying close attention to the scream deep in the corridor, but because of his fusion with the T-virus, his eyesight was much better than that of ordinary people. Even in such a dark corridor, he could see the figure.

That figure was a woman with four arms crawling on the wall like a spider!

Laura!

Chen Chen felt a violent jolt in his heart and he immediately called out the monster’s name.

The reason Chen Chen could call out its name was that this was a monster from a game, but how could a monster in a game appear in reality?

Thinking of this, Chen Chen immediately turned his head and looked at the crowd with a solemn expression. “Which of you have played The Evil Within?”

“Me... Me!”

After hearing this, a short boy immediately stammered out a reply. “So, you’ve seen it too. That monster just now, is it The Evil Within’s La, Lau, Ra, Laura?”

Hearing these words, Chen Chen’s eyes suddenly lit up. He walked quickly toward the boy, who constantly retreated in alarm.

“You, what are you trying to do?”

“Did you talk about this game just now?”

Chen Chen stared steadily at the boy, giving him a huge amount of pressure. “Tell me, did you just talk about this game with someone?”

“I didn’t. It’s just that I’ve been playing through this old game recently, so I was thinking about the strategy in my mind...”

The boy swiftly said in fear.

“As I thought!”

Chen Chen raised his eyebrows and he looked down the corridor again. The red figure of Laura had long disappeared. Chen Chen said immediately, “In this case, Wang Liang, take everyone away and climb out of here!”

Chen Chen pointed to the head of the Publicity Department of the student council who had remained silent all this time and said in an unquestionable tone, “Climb out of the elevator shaft. I have been here before and I know that it’s the exit!”

“Really?”

Wang Liang was shocked. He was half-skeptical at first, but when he saw Chen Chen’s eyes, he felt his body shudder and all his doubts disappeared. Then, he gritted his teeth and said to the group, “Everyone, come with me!”

With that said, he leaned out himself and looked into the elevator shaft.

After the elevator had dropped down, there was only a black abyss left in the elevator shaft. Even just glancing at it would make people feel weak in the knees. Nonetheless, at this time, the group did not care about this anymore. They suddenly discovered that, on the outer wall of the elevator shaft, there was a stairway for people to climb through!

This staircase was embedded in the elevator space. Although its appearance was astonishing, everyone understood that this was probably the only way out...

Many people instantly began to scramble and one by one they went frantically to the elevator shaft and prepared to climb up the stairs inside.

At this time, there was another piercing scream from the depths of the corridor. This time, Chen Chen did not hesitate anymore. His Field energy stretched out directly, heading toward the depths of the corridor.

It covered five meters, ten meters, fifteen meters...

Chen Chen’s Field energy stretched ahead for 20 meters. This level was close to the strength of Chen Chen’s Field in the dream world!

This immense power gave Chen Chen a flicker of confidence and he peered into the darkness, trying to spot Laura’s shadow.

If his guess was not wrong, the dimension he had been drawn into now was the meme of the old movie Silent Hill, a memetic effect called the “Otherworld”...

Chen Chen thought silently. After all, the withered, decayed floors and walls, and the space that was isolated from the outside world — these characteristics were very close to the old movie Silent Hill, from nearly 20 years ago.

As for the Otherworld in that movie, it was created by the huge hatred in the heart of a little girl, Alessa, who was brutally bullied, burned by the townspeople, but was later rescued...

In the movie, Alessa was cast aside by everyone because of the influence of the local church. She was furthermore bullied and humiliated. In the end, she was even immolated by the church as a sacrifice to God. Although she was eventually rescued, the seeds of hatred were planted in the young girl’s heart.

Her hatred turned into a demon, trapping all the residents in that small town in the Otherworld she had created.

Not only that but her hatred had turned into a group of extremely terrifying monsters, who continued to slaughter the villagers. It seemed that only by killing them all could the hatred in her heart be vented.

The reason Chen Chen did not think of this at first was just that this was not science fiction but a horror film.

Chen Chen had never expected that such a horror film that involved religion would be recognized by the USB flash drive.

Indeed, it could only manifest in the real world if it was recognized by the USB drive.

If this was the case, Laura’s appearance could also be explained...

The Otherworld’s memetic ability was to create an alternate dimension. At the same time, all the dark sides of one’s heart would turn into monsters and attack everyone.

In other words, this memetic effect must have an anchor point. Just as the Otherworld in Silent Hill was conceived of by Alessa, now, the Otherworld Chen Chen was in must also have a human being as the carrier.

This carrier had a high probability of being random. It could be anyone, so the short boy just now had become the anchor of the Otherworld this time.

Therefore, Chen Chen had asked the question “Which of you have played The Evil Within?” after seeing Laura.

Moreover, since that guy was the anchor point, if he wanted to leave, it should be achievable with just one thought. That was why Chen Chen said to them that there was an exit in the elevator shaft.

When the guy thought there was an exit in the elevator shaft, then it was very likely that there was an exit there...

All these thoughts flashed through Chen Chen’s mind. At this time, he only had one purpose and that was to block Laura who was about to attack everyone and allow the boy who was the anchor point to escape from this place. This was the only way for the Otherworld meme to collapse of its own volition.

chapters.title: Chapter 438: An Unexpected Turn Of Events
chapters.body:
Chapter 438: An Unexpected Turn Of Events

Chapter 438: An Unexpected Turn of Events

Chen Chen’s Field energy was like a searchlight with an invisible beam, extending in the depths of the corridor. The moment Laura entered his Field’s detection range, he would immediately detect her.

However, the reality was beyond Chen Chen’s expectations.

In the elevator shaft where everyone had fled, there was a piercing horrible howl. This howl went from far to near, then from near to far, filled with unspeakable despair, whizzing past behind Chen Chen.

Soon, the drawn-out sound became fainter and finally disappeared completely because of the distance.

Then, a second sound and a third sound...

Chen Chen knew that these three cries meant that three people had fallen from the elevator shaft into the invisible abyss.

“Cr*p!”

Chen Chen was powerless. He only heard the crowd behind him screaming as they crawled out of the elevator shaft, looking stunned and confused.

“There’s another one inside!”

The boy who had become the anchor finally climbed out crying and he scampered directly to Chen Chen’s side and wailed. “There’s another one at the exit of the elevator shaft. Wang Liang and Zheng Kai and the rest have fallen and died!”

The screams of the crowd made Chen Chen frown but he was still staring at the corridor in front of him. Even though the guy said that there was one behind them, Chen Chen did not look back. After all, even if the monster in the elevator shaft was about to attack, this group of students would act as a physical shield.

As for Chen Chen himself, he did not have a strong enough Field to take care of both monsters.

“Have you heard it!”

The short boy saw that Chen Chen was ignoring him, so he simply grabbed Chen Chen’s clothes and shouted, “Wang Liang and the rest have fallen!”

“Get off!”

Chen Chen’s eyes flashed ferociously. He suddenly turned around and slapped the other guy in the right cheek. In an instant, the short boy had no time to react and was blown backward by the largest force he had experienced in this lifetime!

“Clang!”

His body slammed into the wall next to the elevator and he coughed up a few mouthfuls of blood!

“Ahh —!”

Everyone screamed repeatedly. They were trapped between the devil and the deep blue sea. They could only huddle in place, not knowing where to flee.

“If you hadn’t become an anchor, I’d just kill you with that slap just now!”

Chen Chen said in a low voice. All this while, he did not even glance at the short boy.

However, the monster seemed to have noticed that Chen Chen was distracted. It had been lurking in the darkness and finally rushed out. It let out an ear-splitting shriek and climbed across the ceiling suddenly, so fast that it was impossible to keep track of it by sight!

It was a shame that the creature was up against a new human being who had been optimized by the T-virus. In the instant that everyone else barely had time to turn and look, Chen Chen had already detected it. At once a dim light flickered before Chen Chen and shot toward the monster’s face!

“Agh!”

Before the blood-red monster had time to rush at Chen Chen, its body burst out in a fountain of blood and it fell directly to the ground and rolled over several times. At an unknown time, three of its four arms had been severed at the shoulder!

At this point, Laura was going to become a limbless Laura.

By now, everyone could see that the monster in front of them was a woman with disheveled hair, but this woman was covered in bloodstains. No one knew if this was her own blood or the traces left after she had murdered her victims.

Three of its arms were severed at this time and only one bony arm was left constantly clawing the ground as if it wanted to get up.

However, this was not the end. Just when this handicapped yet determined Laura was about to stand up again, there was another “whoosh”. In the darkness, it was impossible to see what had lashed out. Everyone only saw that the monster’s legs were broken in the same instant!

At once, a large volume of blood spurted out again!

“Argh —!!!”

The monster collapsed completely on the cold floor, but even so, it raised its head and snarled at Chen Chen a few meters away.

“Pftt!”

However, the monster’s roar was ultimately halted in the throat. In the next second, its head flew back in a splatter of blood, rolled more than ten meters away, and did not move anymore...

Now, the monster was completely silent.

“That’s it?”

Looking at the monster that died instantly in front of him, Chen Chen tilted his head impassively. Then, in one gesture, a graphene poker card that had been greatly damaged spun back toward him.

Seeing that the card had been damaged, Chen Chen flicked it slightly and slammed it into the wall.

With a sharp “crack”, the nearly transparent card was smashed into smithereens.

Still, throughout this scene, Chen Chen looked like a god in the eyes of the rest. He did not even take a step at all, yet the monster that rushed toward him was dismembered!

“Cool cool cool!”

Standing in the crowd, Zhang Wei could not help shouting, “I’ve never admired many people in my life. My roommate is one and you’re the second! O Great God, you’re not human! You’re not a mere human being!”

Chen Chen did not bother responding to such weird praise. He stepped forward, squatted, and started to examine the monster, but at this moment, a bloody hand suddenly stretched out from the black hole in the elevator shaft behind Zhang Wei!

This bloody hand seized Zhang Wei by his shoulder while he was speaking. It seemed that in the next second, Zhang Wei would be dragged backward!

Zhang Wei’s eyes flashed blankly and he subconsciously threw the crucifix in his hand behind him. The moment the crucifix touched the bloody hand, the bloody hand seemed to have touched a lump of soldering iron and suddenly retracted!

“Arghh!”

Until then, Zhang Wei finally realized what had happened just now. He jumped in shock and at the same time, he did not forget to pick up the crucifix that had fallen on the ground while he was screaming and retreating quickly.

Everyone also saw the scene of Zhang Wei being attacked. They all followed suit, crying out and running behind Chen Chen as they stared at the blackness of the elevator shaft in dazed alarm.

Chen Chen was astounded. His Field power carefully examined Zhang Wei’s crucifix all over, but no matter how he looked at it, it was just a crucifix made of pure silver.

The workmanship was not even meticulous but was rather crude.

Could the crucifix restrain the ghosts in this meme?

This occurred to Chen Chen before he shot down the idea.

What kind of joke was this? If the crucifix could restrain the ghosts in memes, why bother to study meme technology?

It was not so much that the crucifix could restrain the meme. Chen Chen would rather believe that the urine on the crucifix just now was the main factor. Perhaps the ghost hand felt that the urine was too disgusting, it shrank back in response.

“What are you trying to do?”

At this time, it was not only Chen Chen, but even the group of students could not help but frequently glance at the crucifix in Zhang Wei’s hand. This immediately caused Zhang Wei to retreat warily.

Still, since Chen Chen was still here, everyone just stared at Zhang Wei greedily, but no one moved to snatch it.

“You want to snatch what’s mine?”

Seeing everyone’s gaze, Zhang Wei did not even think about it and immediately backed into the darkness. “You teammates aren’t reliable. I won’t team up with you, I want to go solo!”

After that, Zhang Wei turned around and ran toward the depths of the corridor.

Chen Chen did not stop him, merely watched him as he fled from Chen Chen’s field of vision. After that Chen Chen retracted his gaze.

He was not trying to rescue everyone now but to find a way out of this Otherworld. It was sufficient to ensure the anchor was not dead. Naturally, he would save the others if possible, but if that could not be done, Chen Chen would not actively play the part of a hero.

Thinking of this, Chen Chen looked at the short boy who had been slapped in the face again. At this time, half of his cheek was already swollen like a steamed bun and even his eye was sealed shut.

“Everyone, come with me.”

Chen Chen commanded the group and then walked in the direction of the elevator shaft.

His Field extended to the elevator shaft first, trying to find the monster hiding in the dark, but when he came to the elevator shaft and looked up into the space, he found that there was nothing in there now.

Not only that, but around 40 to 50 meters above the elevator shaft, a white light shone in as if there was an exit.

Still, Chen Chen knew that if the anchor did not go in, even if it was an exit, he would not be able to get out.

Therefore, he simply took the lead and climbed up the stairs in the elevator shaft first.

Seeing that Chen Chen had taken the lead, everyone had the guts to follow behind.

Originally, there were 16 or 17 people pulled into the Otherworld on the third floor underground, but because half of them died in the elevator, only eight people were left. Later on, three people fell into the elevator shaft, and Zhang Wei left the team. At this time, apart from Chen Chen, there were only four people left. Of the four, there were two men and two women. In addition to the short boy who became the anchor of the Otherworld, there was also the beautiful girl that Chen Chen had previously bumped into in the elevator.

Presently, the four of them followed Chen Chen, desperately crawling toward the place where the white light was shining above their heads.

“That ghostly hand... Will it be waiting for us up there...”

As he was crawling, the little boy looked panicked and uncertain. He kept looking up, but he was also anxious about what was below, so he kept looking down. It seemed that the abyss-like world of the black hole below was more terrifying than the unknown above.

However, as he crawled and looked down, suddenly, a gray shadow flitted across the darkness below.

“Gah!”

The short guy yelled loudly and at the same time, he climbed up swiftly while jostling the other man above him. “There’s something below, there’s something below! Hurry up!”

The team that had just calmed down was in a mess again.

Chen Chen looked down when he heard these words, but he did not see anything, so he had to say, “Stop yelping. Just speed up. Even if there’s something underneath, it will take some time for them to catch up with us!”

With that said, he used his Field energy and flew upward suddenly!

With the help of his Field energy, Chen Chen came to the white light at the top of the elevator shaft in just two breaths. It was only then that he realized, the white light was shining in from a vent and outside the vent, there was real ground, and moreover, it was the roof of the office building!

Seeing this, Chen Chen slammed his foot into the guardrail on the vent, kicking the iron guardrail directly. In a flash, he had dashed into the outside world!

However, the moment he rushed out, Chen Chen’s expression shifted!

As he rushed out, the scene in front of him also changed from being the view on the top of the building to the first floor of the office building he had just come from!

However, there was a slight difference between the lobby of the office building in front of him and the lobby he saw before. Namely, now it seemed that no one had been here for a long time, with thick dust and rotting walls everywhere.

He could only see a gray, foggy world outside the door.

“This is still the Otherworld!”

Seeing this scene, Chen Chen suddenly wore a grave look. He still remembered that the “Otherworld” in Silent Hill was a collective term for two worlds. Unlike the real world, the Otherworld was also divided into the “Otherworld” and the “Fog World”.

When they first entered Silent Hill, people would walk into a world perpetually filled with fog and white ash drifting in the sky.

There was still a small amount of light in this world, allowing people to see the surroundings clearly.

However, if the siren sounded, then this world would quickly transform into a world full of flames, darkness, and depravity.

Only then would the visitors truly fall into the crisis-ridden Otherworld.

“Could it be that we have always been in the Fog World just now?”

Chen Chen murmured.

At this moment, everyone behind him finally climbed to the top. The four of them panted heavily and slumped to the ground one by one. At the same time, they looked overjoyed. “We escaped, we escaped!”

“Something’s wrong!”

Still, just as the four of them heaved a sigh of relief, one of them suddenly sensed something was wrong. He looked around in horror. “How did this place become like this? Is this still the same first floor we came in from?

“Could it be that we haven’t escaped?”

As he questioned, the remaining three cried out in disbelief.

Just when everyone was at a loss, suddenly, a whining alarm sounded from a distance. It had a peculiar impact, sweeping by everyone’s ears like a demonic noise!

What sound was this!

“This is Silent Hill. I should’ve thought of it, this is the world of Silent Hill!”

Finally, the short boy fully understood his situation at this time. He grabbed his hair and collapsed, crying, “We’re dead meat, we can’t escape at all! There’s absolutely no way to escape!”

The rest could only listen to the cry of his collapse and the strange alarm sound in their ears. It was as if this sound was trying to drill into their ears, producing an irritation that could not quite be expressed. Even if they covered their ears, it was useless.

However, Chen Chen seemed to be unaffected by it. He just stared at the door of the lobby because he noticed that, along with the sound of the alarm, the light outside the door was dimming gradually...

After a while, the last ray of light in the sky outside the door had darkened fully. At this time, the lobby on the first floor was the same as the third floor underground. One could not even see one’s own hand!

This was still not that bad. As the siren continued to wail, the walls and floor of the lobby decayed, and the floor even started to cave in. Beneath the floor, there was a gush of lava hot enough to scorch people!

This was how it usually went in Silent Hill...

Chen Chen took a deep breath, revealing an extremely solemn expression.

In his perception, a group of ceaselessly twitching monsters had walked out of the darkness and surrounded the lobby of the office building little by little. His Field could extend beyond the door and suddenly, he saw the group of monsters, which all turned out to be...

They were all...

When Chen Chen saw their appearance clearly, he was surprised for once.

Those monsters turned out to be beautiful female zombies wearing black silk and maid costumes!

...

On the other side at this time, Zhang Wei still stayed in the space on the third floor underground. He carefully held up the crucifix and he found a room whose door could be opened.

Seeing this, Zhang Wei took out the temperature-measuring gun and measured the room. Suddenly, the words -15° appeared on the display!

“F*ck, bitterly cold! It’s a haunted room!”

Immediately, Zhang Wei could not help but sigh. “Sigh, how great would it be if these ghosts were all young ladies in black silk maid costumes...”

chapters.title: Chapter 439: Getting Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 439: Getting Out

Chapter 439: Getting Out

As he was hit by the chilling temperature, Zhang Wei could not help exhaling heavily. Only then did he realize that there was blood everywhere on the floor.

“Why is there so much blood, could, could it be...”

Zhang Wei frowned as if thinking of something. Then he suddenly showed an incredulous expression. “Could it be that there’s a female ghost in this haunted room?”

Thinking of this, to prevent the female ghost from entering the hunting phase, Zhang Wei immediately took out a pack of smudge sticks, quickly lit it, and placed it on the ground. This set of actions was done so smoothly, who knew how many times he had trained in private.

“Very well, after lighting the smudge sticks, I’ll have 1 minute and 30 seconds. The outcome will be determined in the next 1 minute and 30 seconds!”

Zhang Wei looked extremely serious. He immediately took out a flashlight that emitted ultraviolet light and shone it on the wall.

“No fingerprints!”

After shining it around, Zhang Wei solemnly turned off the flashlight again. “It’s bitterly cold, there are no fingerprints, and it can’t write... Many types of ghosts have been eliminated and now only the last step is needed to determine the identity of the ghost.”

Thinking of this, he glanced at the time, then opened his pocket and took out a metal box-like object. There were five small lights on the top of the box. As he took it out, he immediately held it in front of him and pressed a button.

“Beep beep beep...”

A green dot appeared at the top.

“Hmm?”

When he saw this, Zhang Wei stroked his chin and said gravely, “The temperature in the room is so low, which means that the ghost is still in the room, but the EMF isn’t active at all. If everything else is eliminated, the answer has been determined!”

With that, Zhang Wei suddenly pointed forward with his right hand while raising his elbow and lowering his hand, he shouted, “The type of ghost is...

“A Mare!”

...

At ground level, Chen Chen looked at the dimming sky and the constantly approaching maid costume monsters. Several graphene cards shot out at the same time. In the next second, he watched as the rows of monsters in front of him fell like wheat!

One row, two rows, three rows!

This was like a human-powered meat grinder. Any monster that was within 20 meters of Chen Chen, no matter what it was, would end up sliced into pieces in an instant!

However, Chen Chen discovered that these monsters did not die even after being cut into two. They were still crawling toward the group. Due to this, he had to slice continuously until the limbs and heads of the monsters were cut off so that they were unable to move.

“Snap!”

Nonetheless, after one of the graphene cards had pierced the tenth monster, it finally could not hold on anymore, and broke into dozens of shards with a sharp snap and dropped to the ground.

Then, the second card, and the third...

As the sky became completely dark, Chen Chen shredded hundreds of monsters in a few minutes, but there were more and more monsters in the darkness, densely packed like a tide.

Perhaps it was an illusion but the darker it got, the faster these monsters moved.

“Agh, save me!”

Suddenly, a woman’s scream came from behind Chen Chen. The girl named Zhang Jiao saw a pair of hands suddenly appear in front of her eyes. These hands stretched out from behind her head and crept toward her eyes bit by bit...

Chen Chen had just crushed the monster in front of him, but when he turned his head, he immediately saw a strange scene — behind the girl, a pair of pale hands had emerged!

“Another kind of ghost?”

Chen Chen was shocked. In the next second, he saw those hands gripped fiercely and immediately, the two eyeballs of the girl named Zhang Jiao were dug out bloodily!

Zhang Jiao fell to the ground, turning blue, and was completely silent...

This scene stunned the other three people.

No, this was not a monster in Silent Hill, this was the method of death in Phasmophobia!

Seeing this scene, Chen Chen suddenly realized something in astonishment. He grabbed the short boy and asked sharply, “Have you ever played Phasmophobia?”

At this time, the short boy was so scared that his soul had fled his body. He shook his head desperately. “I haven’t, I really haven’t. I only played The Evil Within before!”

“D*mn it!”

Chen Chen threw him to the ground fiercely and at the same time, waved his hand. The monsters that had gathered again behind him were dismembered one by one and Chen Chen looked at the vent from before!

“It’s that Zhang Wei, the anchor point has shifted!”

At this moment, Chen Chen had fully understood. It was no wonder that Zhang Wei was able to fight off the ghost by throwing his crucifix because he had become a new anchor at that time!

In other words, the anchor point is constantly shifting.

Thinking of this, Chen Chen stepped forward and rushed into the vent again. He must find Zhang Wei immediately. What would happen if the anchor died in the Otherworld?

Although Chen Chen did not know, what he knew was that the death of the anchor would never make the Otherworld disappear. It was more likely that Chen Chen would be locked in the Otherworld forever!

Still, before Chen Chen could rush down the vent, the vent suddenly transformed in the next second, instantly turning into an extremely ordinary wooden door. There was a creak and Zhang Wei stepped out of the wooden door, his body stooped furtively.

“Great, I’m finally out!”

Seeing everyone outside the door, Zhang Wei suddenly exhaled. He wiped the cold sweat from his forehead and stared at everyone uncertainly... Then at the bodies behind them.

“Huh?”

Seeing the maid monsters all over the ground, Zhang Wei not only did not feel any panic but was even ecstatic at first. Then he shook his head regretfully. “What a pity...”

These words were still echoing in Chen Chen’s ears when in the next second, he only felt his vision blurring. When Chen Chen came back to his senses again, he found that he had appeared in the original server room.

In the ground, there was still a huge crack, but Professor Wang Xi’s body was not in the crack. All that was left was a rust-stained iron bed that had been placed there for a long time.

On this iron bed, one could make out the traces left by someone lying down. It appeared that the person had been lying down for a long, long time until the iron bed was full of stains made by that person.

Countless patches of grease and rust intermingled, exuding filthiness that was borderline evil.

Seeing this scene, Chen Chen suddenly reacted.

He had left the Otherworld.

To be sure, Chen Chen deliberately walked out of the server room into the corridor, but immediately saw three students run out of the student council, screaming and running upstairs.

These three were the three who had survived just now.

“That is to say, Zhang Wei, as the anchor, followed the rules of the game Phasmophobia, so after leaving the vent, he thought he was out of danger, so the world was shut down immediately?”

Chen Chen thought silently. Following that, he walked to the classroom and looked inside, only to see that the classroom was empty.

Those students who died in the Otherworld had all disappeared...

“Sure enough...”

Chen Chen took a deep breath. At once, he heard the sound of someone coming down to this floor at the end of the corridor, so he stopped hesitating and returned to the server room at the end of the corridor. At the same time, the mental force in his mind burst out!

With a loud “boom”, the gap in the floor widened again and several floorboards were pried away, completely exposing the iron bed under the ground.

Immediately, Chen Chen picked up the iron bed with one hand and walked directly to the stairs at the end of the corridor.

“Hey, who are you! What are you doing!”

Still, just as he was leaving the computer room, Chen Chen immediately saw two men in security uniforms approaching him. Seeing Chen Chen carrying a huge iron bed as if it was a toy, they suddenly became vigilant and yelled at him as they rushed over.

Chen Chen did not slow down, but took out a memory eraser and flashed them directly!

“Click!”

After a dazzling flash, the movements of the two men suddenly stopped.

Chen Chen carried the iron bed and walked past them.

“Sir Godfather, what happened?”

When he reached the first floor, the wireless headset was switched on again, and Little X’s voice came. “Is it because you were underground? Just a few minutes ago, your signal was disconnected.”

“Was it only a few minutes? How long was it specifically?”

Chen Chen asked immediately.

“The specific time was three minutes and twenty-five seconds.”

Chen Chen’s expression immediately sharpened when he heard these words. “Only more than three minutes? So, the time flow in the Otherworld and the real world isn’t the same...”

“Otherworld? What is that?”

Little X asked curiously.

“It’s a long story.”

Chen Chen did not directly explain but gave an order again, “X, destroy all surveillance feeds within the school today and at the same time, find me the three people who just rushed out of the third underground floor. Send someone to erase their memory of today.”

Speaking of this, Chen Chen suddenly paused because he saw that, behind a flowerpot, Zhang Wei was peeping at Chen Chen surreptitiously, not realizing that Chen Chen had spotted him.

Chen Chen added. “No, it should be four people. One of them lives in Dorm 404 of dormitory building No. 1. His name is Zhang Wei.”

“Understood!”

Little X promptly agreed.

Immediately, Chen Chen carried the iron bed and hid in an uninhabited office. At the same time, he commanded, “Ask Cao and his men to dress up as workers and help me transport the iron bed out.”

“Understood. Cheng Cao has been on standby for a long time and can be mobilized at any time.”

Little X replied.

In less than twenty minutes, Chen Chen saw Cheng Cao wearing a school uniform, coming toward Chen Chen’s office with a few of his men and then they carried the iron bed out.

Outside the school gate, a truck had been waiting for a long time. They put the iron bed into the cargo space and went away in full view of the crowd.

At this time, Chen Chen had already gotten into the truck. Currently, he was sitting in the co-pilot’s seat with a pensive expression. He had almost fully parsed what had happened before.

This iron bed was nothing other than the one taken from the movie Silent Hill and its original owner was Alessa who was severely burned by the fire.

Chen Chen still remembered that at the end of the movie, Alessa was lying on an iron bed, controlling the extremely sharp wires extending from the iron bed to rip apart the survivors of the entire town.

In other words, this iron bed was the key to triggering the meme of the Otherworld.

Even if he had figured out this step, Chen Chen’s doubts were still unresolved because he still remembered that at the moment he broke open the ground, he saw the body of Professor Wang Xi. At that time, Wang Xi’s body was lying on this iron bed.

However, after pulling Chen Chen into the Otherworld, Wang Xi did not become the anchor of the Otherworld. Otherwise, no matter how many graphene poker cards Chen Chen had, no matter how powerful his Field was, he would be exhausted to death by endless monsters.

Plus, in addition to the monsters that could be killed, in the end, there would be ghosts similar to Kayako of Ju-on who could kill at a touch. These were not beings that could be held back by his Field and physical strength.

He had to say that, unlike the plot of Zhao Shanhe, the previous owner of the USB flash drive, during the last hypnosis, the danger of this attack was far lesser than the last time.

Not only that, but the attack ended very quickly. Even before Chen Chen had figured out the situation, it was resolved by the guy named Zhang Wei...

This dramatic twist made Chen Chen feel like crying and laughing, yet it felt like he was punching thin air at the same time. Still, no matter what, the clues regarding Professor Wang Xi were also cut short here.

Just as Chen Chen was thinking about this, Little X’s voice came again. “Sir Godfather, I’ve erased all surveillance feeds from the school. I’ve also found out the identities of the four students and our people are rushing toward them now.”

“Very good. This is a big matter, we must erase the memories of those four people.”

Chen Chen nodded and then suddenly thought, even if Zhang Wei’s memory was not erased, surely no one would believe his words based on how unreliable he usually was?

He shook his head and stopped thinking about these things. Chen Chen just planned to rest for a while, but Cheng Cao on the side suddenly asked, “Boss, where are you going next?”

“Maybe I’ll go back to Handu to meet my parents. After all, it’s almost time for Chinese New Year.”

Chen Chen replied, “Cao, you may have a break too, but before that, this iron bed must be kept well, and it must be sealed so that no one can touch it, understand?”

“Yes.”

Cheng Cao answered immediately.

“Oh, right...”

Hearing that Chen Chen was about to return to Handu next, Little X suddenly interrupted. “It just so happens that there was news from your parents today. I haven’t got a chance to tell you yet!”

“What news, tell me.”

Chen Chen asked lazily.

“Uh...”

Little X stumbled over her words. “Sir Godfather, congratulations, I’m afraid you’re about to... Become a big brother!”

Chen Chen: “???”

...

After Chen Chen had left the campus carrying an iron bed, the case of the missing persons immediately drew strict attention from the school because about a dozen students suddenly disappeared from the third basement floor of the office building. This could be said to be a momentous case that rarely happened even in the entire world.

However, what followed was a series of shocking developments — the entire school’s surveillance system was hacked silently and all recordings had disappeared. Not only that, the three students who were with the dozen missing persons had forgotten everything that happened at that time.

This phenomenon even occurred to two security guards.

The only suspicious thing was that many people had witnessed several men dressed as workers on campus, who had left carrying an old iron bed. Moreover, a huge deep pit had appeared in the server room on the third floor of the basement...

In short, this was destined to be another unresolved case that was difficult to crack.

When the school was caught in a storm of public opinion over this matter, Chen Chen had already left the bustling Shagdu and returned to his parents.

chapters.title: Chapter 440: Homecoming
chapters.body:
Chapter 440: Homecoming

Chapter 440: Homecoming

“Dad, Mom, how many months along are you, and is it a boy or girl?”

“Just two months and it’s a boy. We found out a few days ago. At first, I didn’t want to keep it, but of all things, your dad stopped me from getting an abortion...”

“Ahem, if this was the past, I’d let you get an abortion, but now... Our bodies are much tougher than before and we’re like young people in our twenties or thirties. Little Chen is also doing well. I just thought since this was the case, why don’t we keep the baby...”

In the living room of a villa, Chen Chen and his parents were sitting on sofas that faced each other. All the housekeepers had been sent away on one pretext or another and only the three members of Chen Chen’s family were in the large living room.

At this time, Chen Chen’s parents were a little reticent and embarrassed when facing Chen Chen.

“Is this the last one?”

At this time, Chen Chen could not help asking. He was afraid that he would suddenly gain a gaggle of younger siblings for no reason.

Hearing this, his father immediately blushed. “What did you say, you brat, of course, it’s the last one!”

Chen Chen did not say much in response but just nodded. “It’s fine. Anyway, the one-child policy ended about ten years ago. Have the baby if you want, I don’t have any thoughts.”

“That’s good.”

Chen Chen’s mother heaved a sigh of relief. She was afraid that Chen Chen would not agree to have an extra brother. After all, Chen Chen was now very successful and his opinions carried a lot of weight at home.

It must be said that, after using the Medpod 3000, Chen Chen’s parents, both in appearance and physical function, had returned to their early thirties from the age of fifty. It was no wonder that Chen Chen would have an additional younger brother.

“By the way, when the Chinese New Year is over, you two should come with me to the Eco Science City again. This year’s health maintenance should also be carried out.”

Chen Chen suddenly reminded them. “This kind of maintenance is best done once a month. It’s just that you’re not willing to move to Namibia with me. Otherwise, your health would be even better now.”

“Why do we have to go again?”

Suddenly, Chen Chen’s father expressed his reluctance. “Once a year is good enough. Once a month, who can stand it? Wouldn’t we have to take a plane every day?”

With that, he kept waving his hand. “We’re not going!”

“What are you saying!”

Chen Chen’s mother was so indignant that she swatted her husband. “Our son is just fulfilling his filial duty. Wouldn’t it be great to live thirty years longer?” She raised her head and asked expectantly, “Can it make us even younger?”

“Of course, you can even be a college student in your twenties.”

Chen Chen joked.

Following that, Chen Chen chatted with his parents for a while, then got up and went back to his room.

In the room, there was only a bed and a desk. The bedding had been exposed to the sun and emitted the aroma of grilled mites. On the desk table, apart from a few books of Crayon Shin-chan, which he had read as a child, there was only a laptop and nothing else.

Subconsciously, Chen Chen swept the place with his Field energy, scanning the room again.

Very clean, there was no wiretapping.

Chen Chen nodded. It seemed that the people he sent to protect his parents were still doing their jobs. Of course, the biggest savior was still Little X.

She had a grip on the entire World Wide Web. If someone was planning anything against Chen Chen’s parents, unless they did not use the Internet to transmit messages, it would be difficult to evade Little X’s supervision.

“Sir Godfather, since just now, the defense of your parent’s community has been taken over by the government as an emergency.”

At this moment, Little X’s voice suddenly came from the headset. “It seems that the authorities have received news of your return, but they didn’t directly look for you. Instead, they dressed up as security and are standing guard outside the community area. Several businessmen who had wanted to visit you have been blocked.”

“It’s normal.”

Chen Chen nodded. “Anyone who possesses dozens of era-transcending technologies or who is even suspected of possessing a secret weapon that can destroy a continent will be treated like this. It just depends on when they want to talk to me.”

He rested in the room for a while. At this moment, Chen Chen suddenly heard two sets of footsteps approaching the door. One of them was his father but the other was not his mother.

After a few seconds, the two sets of footsteps came to the door of the room and Chen Chen got up and opened the door.

“Er...”

Chen Chen’s father was about to knock on the door but saw that Chen Chen had opened the door. At once he said, “Look who’s here? As soon as your cousin heard you came back, he rushed over.”

Chen Chen looked at the 30-year-old young man at the side. It was Chen Zheng, so he nodded and greeted, “Cousin, long time no see.”

“Long time no see, Cousin Chen Chen.”

Chen Zheng smiled goofily and scratched his head awkwardly.

“Aren’t we family, what’s with the formality? Go in and have a good chat. Chen Zheng, don’t just leave when you’re done, have lunch at Uncle’s place.”

“Okay, thank you, Uncle.”

Chen Zheng thanked him and followed Chen Chen into the room.

“Just sit anywhere.”

Chen Chen pointed to the chair in front of the desk, then leaned against the bed casually, and continued to use his phone.

“Cousin Chen Chen, why didn’t you tell me you were back.”

Chen Zheng said with some enthusiasm, “You’ve been abroad all year and I didn’t have time to report to you about our advertising agency.”

Only then did Chen Chen remember that during Chinese New Year last year, Chen Zheng asked to borrow money from Chen Chen, so Chen Chen simply injected one million in capital, in the name of investment, to help Chen Zheng open an advertising company. Chen Zheng took care of the management and the shares were split as 30% for Chen Zheng and 70% for Chen Chen.

Still, now it appeared that the advertising company was doing really well. Now Chen Zheng had gained the air of a big boss. He was wearing a suit and leather shoes and had gotten much rounder with an obvious beer belly.

“I have received the profit dividend.”

Currently, Chen Chen nodded. “And I also believe that you, Cousin, aren’t someone who will try to embezzle funds.”

“Of course!”

Chen Zheng said quickly, “Don’t worry about that, I’m not such a person. You can send a financial officer to check at any time.”

With that, Chen Zheng suddenly said a little worriedly, “Other than that, I found that the reason our advertising company can make millions in profit right at the start, with big commissions almost every month, is because many people want to link up with you through me. As a result, I’ve turned down many big offers, but I don’t know how this will affect you.”

“It’s okay, Cousin, please do as you see fit.”

Chen Chen was indifferent. “If they’re just trying to network with us, then do it if you can. We don’t steal or rob anyone anyway. Still, if there is a possibility of a trap, then turn it down. I’m fine with all that.”

“That’s true as well.”

Chen Zheng immediately felt relieved. “There are many people in our city’s Chamber of Commerce who want to get to know you through me, but I declined. Even so, the value of your villa community has increased significantly. I guess you know the reason.”

Chen Chen nodded and did not dwell on this matter. The community was still so peaceful because Chen Chen was pulling the strings from behind the scenes. Those who wanted to buy a villa next to Chen Chen’s parents to cozy up to them were all secretly dealt with by Chen Chen.

By now, except for a few old residents who did not want to move, almost all of the entire community consisted of bodyguards and Black Knights secretly put in place by Chen Chen.

Next, Chen Zheng mentioned their second uncle’s son and daughter. After the car accident last year, the perpetrators were never found. In the end, their son, Chen Zhi, inherited their house while their daughter, Chen Shan, only took a part of the money and left the family, and got married to someone she met online.

“Chen Shan is already married?”

Chen Chen was startled.

The second uncle’s daughter, Chen Shan, was the same age as Chen Chen, only younger by some months. She had been a playmate for Chen Chen when she was young and she did not inherit her mother’s foul manner.

Then as they grew up, the relationship between the two became distant because of the years of separation.

“It would be nice if she just got married.”

Chen Zheng was a bit distressed. “Cousin Chen Shan also had a hard life. I just heard that the online partner Chen Shan was dating took the one million dowry you gave Chen Shan and ran away alone, leaving only Cousin Chen Shan and the eight-month-old baby in her belly...”

Chen Chen frowned instantly. “When did this happen and why didn’t my parents tell me?”

“Cousin Chen Shan told me not to tell you.”

Chen Zheng smiled bitterly. “It happened last month. You also know what she’s like, so strong and stubborn. Because that b*stard ran away, Chen Shan almost couldn’t pay the rent. I couldn’t bear it and I paid up her rent for a year...”

“Okay, I’ll take care of this.”

Chen Chen nodded and said, “Later, you can ask Cousin Chen Shan to send me the man’s information.”

“Cousin Chen Chen, what are you going to do?”

Chen Zheng’s spirits were lifted at once. After all, he was not of the older generation like Chen Chen’s parents. He still knew how much power and influence Chen Chen’s company had. Apart from anything else, even just the recent developments that happened with Northern America, ultimately resulting in Northern America compromising, would turn anyone speechless.

“Of course, I have to track him down first.”

Chen Chen spread his hands and said helplessly, “What else can I do? We’ll see what Cousin Chen Shan wants. If she wants to start over, she can do that. If she doesn’t want to be with this person, we’ll make him spit out the money. After all, we’re in a society under the rule of law and murder would result in a jail sentence.”

“Dang, well, I’ll leave this to you then.”

Chen Zheng flushed a little. If it were so easy to track down that guy and make him hand over the money, then he would not have been anxious. Still, for Chen Chen, maybe this matter was simple.

Following that, they chatted in sporadic exchanges. Chen Zheng, who was in his early thirties, nonetheless acted like a subordinate in front of Chen Chen.

Half an hour later, Chen Zheng said goodbye and left.

Watching Chen Zheng walk out of the room, Chen Chen said to the air, “X, were you able to find the man’s information?”

“Of course.”

Little X replied, “I’ve found it. The man’s name is Zhang Heng, 35 years old, from Zhongzhou, 1.62 meters tall, 130 kilograms in weight.”

After Little X’s answer, Chen Chen was also sent a sheet of information on his mobile phone. Chen Chen lightly tapped on it and saw a male ID photo. The ID photo showed a man in his thirties.

However, the man had a bit of a baby face, so he looked a little vulgar, yet somewhat attractive.

“According to the IP address of his various social accounts, he has now returned to Zhongzhou. Should I send someone to bring him back?”

Little X asked.

“Bring him back.”

Chen Chen looked at the photo in his hand and then turned off the phone. “See what Chen Shan wants. As long as she doesn’t mind bringing the child up by herself, just dispose of this man.”

As he said, Chen Chen could not help but crack a sinister grin. “No matter what, she’s a member of the Chen family. If he’s allowed to swagger off just like this, how can the Chen family live this down?”

...

Presently, on the other side of things, as the news of Chen Chen’s homecoming spread like wildfire, many security departments suddenly became busier than ever.

This had not always happened. Even during the previous Chinese New Year, Chen Chen had owned a variety of era-defining patents. When he returned to Handu, the authorities did not make a big fuss.

Nevertheless, this year was different. After Blacklight Biotechnology had set foot in the aerospace and military industry and demonstrated various weapons and technologies beyond reality, the Mainland China government’s focus on Chen Chen had increased by two levels. At this time, at the FBI branch in Handu, Chen Chen’s information had been placed in front of more than a dozen people.

“Chen Chen, a student of Shangdu Jiao Tong University, has now deferred his studies. From elementary school to high school, his performance was normal. It was at the end of the freshman semester that he suddenly developed the first-generation plan of the age-reversal treatment program and published it in the international journal, Cell.”

On the podium in the conference room, a female lecturer explained tirelessly, “However, there were some twists and turns during the publication. A school associate professor named Zheng Jian tried to use this paper for his own name, but after meeting Chen Chen, suddenly jumped to his death.”

“Is it murder?”

Someone asked with interest.

“No, when he jumped off the building, Chen Chen had a solid alibi. Plus, an investigation of the deceased found that the deceased had been suspected of murder before his death and the target of murder was his own ex-wife.”

The speaker took a baton, pointed to the middle-aged man on the slide, and continued. “According to Chen Chen’s statement, he used the details of the photo placed on the table, Zheng Jian’s biology major, and the type of cancer of the ex-wife, to figure out that Zheng Jian murdered his ex-wife. Therefore, after Chen Chen exposed this, the other party had to commit suicide to escape punishment.”

“Hey, this is interesting.”

Hearing that, an investigator in his thirties with a beard, who was smoking a cigarette and crossing his legs, said, “So, this other guy was about to indirectly coerce Chen Chen but he committed suicide in the next second. Moreover, I notice that the information states that this happened in twenty-five minutes. That’s to say, it took Chen Chen only twenty-five minutes to cause the death of a man with just his words. Such a record... Tsk tsk, it’s a bit scary to be true...”

“Yes, the case seems very simple on the surface but for him to analyze the clues of the other man in such a short time, to the point where no refutation was possible, requires great skill, at least in terms of logical thinking ability and verbal eloquence.”

A forty-year-old, gray-haired investigator beside solemnly said, “It’s a pity that Chen Chen didn’t join us as a federal investigator.”

“Oh come off it, Old Li, look at who is he now? The chairman of a giant corporate group and a Nobel Prize winner, and you want him to be a federal investigator? Dream on!”

The man with the beard sneered mockingly.

“Okay, we’re digressing. Please continue.”

At this moment, the director of the FBI branch who was sitting in the main seat spoke.

“Yes.”

The speaker on the podium looked chastised and then continued to say, “If this incident was originally just an accident, then the next case might subvert your assumptions.”

As she said, the slide automatically switched to the next piece of information. “Just six months later, that is, during the period when Chen Chen had stopped his studies and started the company — according to our follow-up investigation, he had developed the first APP software, Little X Translation Assistant, and thus had invited several people in the business field for a meeting, but the specific method of contact is unknown.

“However, after participating in an offline discussion at that time, one of the corporate figures named Guo Dazhuang was killed on the spot when he ignored the traffic after going out.”

Hearing this, the many investigators present finally stopped conversing in low voices and they became serious.

chapters.title: Chapter 441: Meet
chapters.body:
Chapter 441: Meet

Chapter 441: Meet

Those who were called for this meeting were all elite members of the FBI. At this time, after hearing that Guo Dazhuang had also died, this group of people finally took things seriously.

After all, even if the previous death of Zheng Jian could be attributed to his guilt and Chen Chen’s way with words, when people around Chen Chen were dying one after another, there was a problem.

“Are there any autopsy reports?”

Someone suddenly asked in a deep voice.

“Yes, the cause of Guo Dazhuang’s death was very normal, namely, a large amount of internal bleeding caused by the impact, which led to death in shock.”

The speaker replied, “Whether it was the surveillance feed or the dashcam of the vehicle that caused the accident, it all indicates that Guo Dazhuang was hit and killed when he was crossing the road, so this incident was classified as a very ordinary traffic accident. If not for the rise of Chen Chen now, which prompted us to begin looking through the old files, no one would even think that this person’s death was related to Chen Chen.”

“Are there any surveillance videos available? Play them.”

The man with a beard asked immediately. In their business, it was all about the chain of evidence. In the absence of evidence, even if there was a faint suspicion in their hearts, no one would immediately say it aloud.

“Yes, we’ve gotten it ready.”

The speaker double-clicked the video on the desktop of the computer and suddenly, everything that was recorded in the video was shown.

The display showed a few storefronts on the screen. There was a sidewalk and under the sidewalk, there was a lot of traffic. It seemed to be during the peak period of people getting off work.

Soon, a man in a suit and leather shoes walked out of a store. His pace was slow and he seemed a little unstable. He lowered his head almost all the way and walked toward the middle of the road without saying a word.

Immediately after crossing the road barrier, an SUV did not have time to brake and slammed into him, sending him flying...

The man in the video flew over ten meters away like a gunny sack, then slid across the ground for several meters, and stopped moving completely.

When the video was over, everyone looked at each other, all wearing confounded expressions.

“Was he drunk?”

The gray-haired investigator Old Li asked.

“No.”

The speaker immediately replied, “In the autopsy report, there was no evidence of alcohol or caffeine in the body of the deceased, but he did walk out of a coffee shop at that time.”

“Then besides Chen Chen, who else was sitting with him?”

“The others were all talents in the IT industry.”

The speaker pushed back her black-rimmed glasses and replied, “These people have each invested in 2% of the dividend stock of the first software developed by Chen Chen. This time, they had become angel investors of Blacklight Biotechnology. Except for the dead Guo Dazhuang, the rest of them invested 10 million yuan and in the following three months, Facebook bought the exclusive right to use the software, and they received nearly 600 million yuan in return.”

“The software you mentioned is Little X Translation Assistant?”

Old Li was suddenly stunned. When Facebook bought the right to use this software at a price of 26 billion, many people were talking about it.

“Ten million to 600 million in only three months. Heh, why didn’t that happen to me?”

The tone of the man with the beard was a little bit sour.

“The main point, Brother Zhou, is that you don’t have that 10 million.”

Someone joked suddenly and for a while, the conference room was filled with laughter.

“Ahem!”

The director coughed. He knew they were getting distracted, so he had to lead them back to the topic again. “Did you notice? Chen Chen met these people and asked them to invest, but Guo Dazhuang went out and was killed by a car. There may be something fishy about this.”

“The autopsy report said that the deceased had no caffeine or other residues of beverages in his stomach. Can it be assumed that he did not drink coffee after entering the coffee shop?”

The bearded man responded solemnly, “In other words, he was being wary, knowing that someone was plotting against him?”

“This is indeed a possibility.”

Old Li said, “Can we summon these people? Ask them what happened at the time, whether Chen Chen had a conflict with the deceased when he was alive, how did they know each other, and who was the waiter at the store at that time? These are all suspicious points that can be investigated.”

“It’s difficult.”

Their director sighed. “After all, it has been four years and since it was an ordinary traffic accident at the time, no one thought about it at all. The waiter in that store has long vanished. As for the investors, we have information on them too. We know all about their shady activities. Although these people are all successful figures in the IT industry, they are all hackers in private.”

“Hackers?”

Everyone was suddenly taken aback. “Then it makes sense. Chen Chen must have been involved in the hacker world!”

“That’s right.”

Everyone agreed on this point.

“However, because of their identities, it’s difficult for us to get useful information out of them.”

Their director continued. “Someone has been sent to contact these people, but these people are all tight-lipped and they insist that nothing happened that day.”

“Then this case is very difficult to investigate...”

Everyone turned contemplative.

“This is the second abnormal death case related to Chen Chen and then there’s the third case...”

At this point, the speaker continued saying.

“There’s more?”

Everyone was flabbergasted.

“Yes, the third incident happened three years ago, but this time, it has nothing to do with Chen Chen because at that time, he had left China and gone to the African Continent to set up his company.”

The speaker said slowly, “The third case related to him occurred at the headquarters of Blacklight Biotechnology. At that time, five foreigners of Chinese descent fell from the headquarters of Blacklight Biotechnology. After identity verification, these five people were all found to be mercenaries who had been illegal armed personnel, but as for who did it, there’s still no answer.”

“It seems to be an international trifle.”

Old Li muttered, “But it seems that Chen Chen has indeed been very restless since he began making his fortune.”

“Then, the fourth and last case.”

The speaker nodded and continued. “The fourth incident occurred during the previous Chinese New Year. This time, the deceased was Chen Chen’s second uncle and aunt.”

When she mentioned this, the speaker looked a little mystified. “In short, there was a little family conflict. Because of Chen Chen’s fortune, the two deceased kept going to Chen Chen’s parents to borrow money. Eventually, things escalated into a physical conflict, but shortly afterward, the two were hit and killed by a truck of unknown origin.”

While she spoke, the speaker played another video. In the video, a truck slammed into and overturned a white car, then backed up a certain distance, and crashed into the car a second time.

In the end, the battered white car was smashed into a ball of fire.

“This is too much.”

The bearded man frowned. “He’d even kill his relatives. This Chen Chen has no regard for the law at all.”

“Don’t say that.”

The director quickly reminded. “There’s no evidence that Chen Chen did this. Chen Chen has a complete alibi and he took the initiative to go to the local police station to make a report, saying that a foreign spy had been threatening him.”

“Spy?”

“Yes and according to the evidence he provided, the local branch of the Investigation Bureau found several spies from the East China Sea Continent.”

The director sighed. “So, Chen Chen was perfectly exonerated at that time.”

“The last case can be said to be very obvious. The only thing missing is a piece of evidence.”

Old Li lit a cigarette and said in a deep voice, “How can there be such a coincidence? They were hit and killed on the road as soon as they clashed with him. It’s true that he wasn’t present at this incident, but based on his current net worth, there would be no need to do it himself.”

“So, we have to find the driver who drove this truck at the time.”

The bearded man replied, “Director, has that person been found?”

“No, they’ve vanished completely.”

The director shook his head. “Gone without a trace as if they had never existed in this world.”

Hearing this, everyone fell into silence for a while.

“By the way, what do you have in mind by asking us to investigate Chen Chen’s past?”

After some mulling, the bearded man suddenly said, “Are you going to get rid of him?”

“I’m guessing it’s just to see if there’s anything we can use in negotiations.”

The director waved his hand and said gravely, “Now, he’s very important to our superiors. After all, you should’ve heard that although this person is from China and the headquarters of Blacklight Biotechnology is also here with us, the real core is in Africa. It’s not easy for our superiors to control him.”

Everyone was speechless, especially the bearded man whose face darkened like a cloud. “So, this suspect will just be left alone?”

“Of course not!”

The director’s heart was thumping. He knew that his subordinate’s bad temper was surfacing again, so he quickly said, “Why would we do that? It’s just that we don’t have evidence. Otherwise, why should we investigate him? If there’s evidence, of course, our superiors will not just ignore him and he’ll be brought to justice.”

“Okay, leave this case to me.”

Hearing this, the bearded man immediately stood up. “I’ll investigate this private corporation case until the truth comes to light!”

With that, he left the conference room directly.

“Zhou Hao, Zhou Hao?”

At this, the director yelled a few times. Seeing that the other party was not coming back, he waved his hand and ended the meeting.

After everyone had left, he reported to his superiors, in a rather troubled mood, what happened in the meeting just now.

“Yes, this is our analysis. Chen Chen may indeed be connected to these cases...

“Yes, I’ll keep a close eye on things!

“Yes, yes...”

After making a hundred promises, he finally hung up the phone, but immediately broke into a bitter smile.

He had long heard that Blacklight Biotechnology had entered the military industry. Not only that, but it had also promoted its military products in a high-profile manner to the Earth Federation headquarters. He heard that those products had attracted the attention of all continents, including China.

Therefore, there was an order to suddenly dig up these old incidents, but it was only because the higher-ups regarded these things as a bargaining chip that could be used to purchase weapons in the future.

As for the ones who died, maybe someday when Chen Chen fell off his pedestal, then that would be the day when the superiors held him accountable.

The director who had already seen through all this shook his head and sighed. As the last one to leave the meeting place, he slowly closed the door of the conference room.

...

Following that, nothing happened. Chen Chen still maintained a peaceful life until the entire Spring Festival was over.

However, Chen Chen was very wary of the gleaming eyes that gradually appeared around him. Obviously, behind these people were sent by the authorities.

At this time, Chen Chen also knew that the authorities had begun investigating his past and many things had been revealed.

“I see.”

Hearing Little X’s report, Chen Chen nodded and said, “It’s normal for the authorities to take precautions against me, but I didn’t expect them to sit tight for so long. They haven’t visited me yet.”

“They’re probably still looking for a chance.”

Little X teased. “It’s just that these poor federal investigators have spent the New Year still having to work... By the way, Sir Godfather, Cheng Cao will soon return from Zhongzhou. He’s seized Zhang Heng and is bringing him back by the highway. He’ll be able to reach Handu soon.”

“Let Cao take that person to the nearby village, don’t come into the city. After all, I have more eyes around me recently.”

Chen Chen thought for a while and said, “Ask Cao to hide him well. I’ll meet this sc*mbag in person later.”

At this point, Chen Chen could not help but feel a little vexed. After all, after Chen Zheng asked for Chen Shan’s opinion, the result was that Chen Shan was willing to forgive the sc*mbag for the sake of the baby and she hoped that the sc*mbag could return to her.

If this were not the case, Cheng Cao would not have abducted that guy for this long journey, but instead drowned him in some river in Zhongzhou. As for the one million that was swindled, Chen Chen did not even intend to get it back. It might as well be that guy’s travel expenses for his journey to the gates of hell.

After that, as the evening approached, Chen Chen swaggered out of his parents’ house with a group of bodyguards, got into a car, and started driving around the city.

After driving a few laps, when he got out of the car, Chen Chen had been replaced by a stand-in. This stand-in did not look like Chen Chen, but his body shape was somewhat similar. Surrounded by bodyguards, the stand-in walked into a high-end hotel.

At this time, the real Chen Chen was already sitting in another van, slowly driving toward the suburbs.

It was not until nine o’clock at night that Chen Chen came to Cheng Cao’s hiding place. He pushed the door and entered, and saw that it was a courtyard-shaped building with a huge yard. The innermost room was lit up, with faintly flickering human shadows.

It seemed that Cheng Cao had heard Chen Chen’s movements outside the door and he cautiously opened the door of the back room. He sighed in relief when he saw that it was Chen Chen. “Boss, I’m happy to report that I’ve brought the man back for you.”

With that, he pointed to a trussed-up man in the room who had a bloody nose and swollen face.

From the looks of it, it was Zhang Heng.

At this time, the man was gagged with a rag. After seeing Chen Chen, he immediately whimpered, looking very frightened.

Still, Chen Chen did not waste time saying nonsense. He just waved his hand at the two men behind and they immediately stepped forward and lifted Zhang Heng onto the bed. One of them opened a medical box, preparing to start an operation on their captive.

The operation was very simple. Chen Chen already knew how to perform it four years ago. It was the simplest operation to implant a God chip.

chapters.title: Chapter 442: Zhou Hao
chapters.body:
Chapter 442: Zhou Hao

Chapter 442: Zhou Hao

The operation process was not long. It took an hour from anesthesia to implantation to suturing all in one go.

As they used local anesthesia, Zhang Heng stayed awake from beginning to end.

In the end, Zhang Heng was finally released from the ropes binding his hands and feet. In the next second, he squealed while crawling on the ground like a dying dog.

“Ah, who are you and what were you doing just now? What did you do to my neck!”

Zhang Heng screamed and moved toward the corner of the wall. After a long period of being bound, his hands and feet had fallen asleep, and he could only crawl on the ground.

“Shut up.”

Chen Chen spoke lightly and at the same time, Cheng Cao brought out a chair from behind Chen Chen. Chen Chen smoothly sat down in front of Zhang Heng.

Following Chen Chen’s order, Zhang Heng’s screams stopped suddenly and he was horrified to realize that his voice had suddenly become silent.

It was as if something was stuck in his throat and his vocal cords did not belong to him at all. In short, after the man in front of him said the words “shut up”, he had lost the ability to speak!

This development horrified him even further, but he could only stare at the group of fiendish men in front of him.

“Have you calmed down? When you have, shut up and listen to me.”
