The Osmond Biotech Headquarters was only several hundred meters away from his position. Right next to it was another building of nearly parallel height. There was only a distance of no more than ten meters separating the two buildings.

Keith was delighted to see this. He immediately descended from the rooftop and found himself a hemp rope. He carried the hemp rope with him and ascended to the roof of the building next to the headquarters.

The sky was very dark at the time but fortunately, the floors in the headquarters were illuminated with ceiling lights. Keith used the shadow projected from the building to make sure his figure could not be caught by anyone on the ground. After he tied the rope into a slipknot, he tossed it into the opposite building!

After several attempts, Keith managed to hook the knot to one of the railings. With a forceful yank, he managed to fasten the rope tightly around the railing.

After that, Keith fastened the rope to a railing on his side as well, instantly creating a passage that connected the two buildings.

After taking a deep breath, Keith climbed onto the railing and then wrapped his arms and legs around the rope. He took his time moving to the other side.

After what seemed like forever, Keith managed to make it to the rooftop of the Osmond Biotech Headquarters using this unconventional method.

Keith did not let his guard down even after making it this far. He cautiously traced down the stairs that connected to the rooftop and entered the corridor where he saw rows of offices. The signboard on the first office read “Chairman and General Manager’s Office”.

Arrived at last...

Keith sighed. He slowly approached the door. It was the height of midnight but he could still see a faint light coming from under the door, implying that someone was inside. He pushed open the door without sparing a moment of hesitation.

The dimly lit office was immediately presented in front of Keith.

The decoration of the office was highly distinctive of the person’s personality. It was not very large and the furnishing was intricate, most of them alternated between black and white color. Only a minimal amount of light was turned on in the office at the moment.

Positioned directly opposite the entrance was a large mahogany desk with a middle-aged man sitting on the opposite end.

This man was none other than the founder of the Osmond that the professor once mentioned – Parker.

“Mr. Parker.”

Keith felt a weight taken off his chest when he saw the head of the corporation. He promptly stepped inside and locked the door behind him. “Allow me to introduce myself, I’m...”

“You’re Rowling Keith.”

The middle-aged man was not surprised by the sudden intrusion of this guest as he displayed a slightly bitter smile. “I’ve heard from Irwin that you’re here to deliver something to me.”

“That’s right!”

Keith immediately stepped forward. His hand reached into the pocket to present a sealed bottle wrapped in bubble wrapping along with a USB drive. He placed them on Parker’s table. “These are the items. This is the AD-001 created by Professor Irwin. He wanted me to deliver them into your hands.”

“Excellent.”

Parker nodded and received the sealed bottle wrapped in bubble wrapping. His finger grazed over it gently for a brief moment before he suddenly stopped as if he just recalled something.

Keith watched as the founder suddenly took a deep breath as if he made up his mind on something. The founder proceeded to get up with the two items in hand and stepped backward.

Keith could not help but note the strange behavior of the founder. For some reason, even after he had delivered what was supposed to be the long-awaited drug, he did not sense the slightest note of surprise from the founder but instead an inexplicable somberness.

It seemed like a mixture of regret and frustration.

While Keith was filled with these puzzling thoughts, he saw that Parker had stepped in front of a window and passed the two items through the window...

‘Hold on!’

Keith was taken by surprise. It was only now when he noticed that there was somebody else standing behind the window at the furthest end of the office!

It took him so long to notice it!

Due to the dim lighting inside the office, Keith could only make out a faint silhouette of this mysterious person. He saw a pair of hands reaching through the window to receive the items. Then, the person disappeared from behind the window and soon, he heard the shuttle of another door located at the back end of the office being opened. The man appeared from behind and started to slowly approach Keith.

As the shadowy figure stepped under the light, Keith finally managed to get a closer look at this person. It was a young Chinese man.

“Mr. Keith, thank you for your delivery.”

The corner of the young man’s lips curled into a smile as he extended his hand out.

chapters.title: Chapter 480: Transformation
chapters.body:
Chapter 480: Transformation

Chapter 480: Transformation

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Keith’s eye widened like two large pearls the moment he saw the black matt gloves this mysterious young man wore. He immediately looked up and also spotted a black-colored collar strapped around the young man’s neck!

It was the uniform of the mysterious organization coming after him!

Unlike the grunts of the mysterious organization, there was the addition of several translucent buttons on the collar that emitted a weak blue-ish glow which gave it a classier look.

Keith immediately turned as pale as a ghost as he stumbled several paces backward until he reached the door. He glared cautiously at the young man who stood before him.

“What is it, wasn’t it you wanted to give these items to me?”

The young man asked with a mocking smile as he took several steps toward Keith, “Why are you running, what are you afraid of? Are you worried that I might eat you?”

“D*mn!”

Panic washed across Keith’s eyes. For some reason he could not put into words himself, this plain-looking young man carried an overbearing aura that suffocated him. He immediately reached his gun and aimed it at the young man. “Don’t come any closer or else I’ll open fire!”

It was right at this moment where the sound of rotor blades coming from outside the window intruded the tranquility of the room. Both Keith and the mysterious young man looked out the window and saw a military helicopter flying outside the window, seemingly searching for something.

Upon seeing this, Keith clenched his jaw and pulled the trigger without any hesitation!

“Bang bang bang bang bang!”

A ripple of gunshots tore through the air. Even Keith did not know how many shots he had fired in total. When he came to his senses and looked in front of him, his expression became twisted into wordless shock!

What seemed like an invisible barrier held all of the fired bullets in mid-air and cut off their momentum instantaneously!

“Fool!”

A biting chill flashed across the young man’s eyes as he clutched Keith’s neck like how one would hold a helpless hatchling. It happened so quickly that Keith barely had time to react. All he felt was something tightening around his neck and his feet being lifted off the ground.

Sharp pain and a sense of suffocation rushed at Keith. He instinctively threw the gun with the empty magazine and tried to wring himself free from his enemy’s clutches. No matter how hard he beat at the mysterious young man’s arm that felt like a piece of steel bar, it refused to budge...

Moments before he thought that he was going to die, the sound of rotor blades repeated outside the window again. This time, there was a piercing flash of light that accompanied it!

“All inhabitants listen up. Put down your weapons. Get down on the ground and wait for the patrol officers to arrive!”

The young man in front of Keith seemed to be unfazed by this sudden warning. On the contrary, his eyes glowed with rage!

“No good...”

Keith felt the clutch around his neck tightening. Just as he felt he was about to have his neck crushed, he heard the sound of gunshots immediately followed by a violent force that flung him into the door behind him!

Somebody inside the helicopter had opened fire at the mysterious young man!

After registering what had happened, Keith acted immediately and dashed back into the corridor and made for the stairway.

“Is there any way to make it out of this situation?”

After Keith got away, the mysterious young man mumbled pensively to himself. He proceeded to turn around to face the helicopter and removed a deformed bullet the size of a fingernail that was stuck to the back of his hand, then he looked at the helicopter that had its mounted guns aimed in his direction.

“I repeat, all inhabitants are to set down your weapons and get down on the ground. Wait for our officers to arrive at the scene!”

The helicopter issued the same warning again.

The mysterious young man tilted his head to one side and suddenly waved his hand outward!

“Bang!”

There was an immediate explosion. The helicopter seemed to be hit by an invisible force and lost control. It immediately tumbled to the ground below!

“Boom!”

Several seconds later, a gigantic column of fire rose from the ground below. It was accompanied by a deafening explosion that tore through the silence of the night. The entire building shook!

“Mr. Chen Chen, you...”

Parker was baffled by everything he had witnessed in the last few seconds. He lay on the ground dumbfounded and looked at Chen Chen like he was staring at a ghost...

Chen Chen ignored Parker as he slowly and calmly turned around and exited the office.

Chen Chen formed a frown as he stepped out of the room. He briefly shook his head from side to side and soon felt a sharp pain invading his nose.

A steady stream of blood poured out of his nose.

“Sir Godfather, we’ve alerted the Northern American military that is here to search for the angel statues. They are advancing toward our position!”

Little X’s voice sounded across the earpiece, her tone was one of confusion. “You had a chance to kill him just now, why did you...”

“I only wanted to see if he had any way of escaping even after being forced into a corner like this.”

Chen Chen answered before Little X could finish forming her question, “It does seem like there’s something different about this Keith because the moment I saw him, my head started throbbing with pain. It’s probably a symptom of my exhaustion of Field this morning added with the injuries that I haven’t fully recovered yet...”

“I advise you to retreat for now. Since he already gave away the drug and its information, there’s nothing he has that can possibly threaten us anymore.”

Little X advised.

“You’re still too naive, X.”

Chen Chen shook his head. “You truly believe the drug and the USB drive he delivered aren’t fakes? Would someone as cautious as him meet Parker with the real drug before getting a proper read on the situation?”

Chen Chen took the bottle of drug as he said this and opened it to give it a quick sniff. He immediately tossed it onto the ground after that.

As expected, it was a fake.

“Others are unable to kill him but perhaps I can. From here on, I won’t be holding back anymore!”

Chen Chen wiped the blood off his nose and approached the stairway. He decided to not exhaust whatever was left of his Field and instead put one arm on the railing and jumped over it to the opposite staircase one floor below!

“Bang!”

There was a tremendous crash as he planted his feet on the opposite railing. After he steadied himself, he turned around and repeated the same process!

“Bang!”

“Bang!”

“Bang...”

The loud crashes echoed across the stairway at a fixed interval. Chen Chen descended the building rapidly at a pace of one floor every three seconds and made it to the bottom floor in under two minutes!

Just as he made it to the bottom, Little X informed again, “Sir Godfather, the target is escaping in a vehicle. The location he’s headed to is... The direction of the Herrank Warehouse District, the Black Knights are in close pursuit!”

Chen Chen frowned at this piece of news. Although Keith did not know about the ongoings in Los Angeles, he still made for the Herrank Warehouse District. This was no mere coincidence.

This was not the time to be bothered with these details. As soon as Chen Chen stepped out of the building, he saw a Black Knight waiting for him outside in a vehicle. He entered immediately and they proceeded to speed toward the direction of the Herrank Warehouse District...

With the rise of the killer statue cases in the city and mass casualty cases reported in the city hall, the police and military forces had evacuated from the Herrank Warehouse District. At this time, the only thing that remained in the area was a large array of police tapes that sectioned off the area.

A sedan appeared and drove along the road leading to the Herrank Warehouse District. Another vehicle emerged from the side of the road out of nowhere and rammed into the white sedan. The sedan was flipped over and tumbled in circles several times before it stopped at the entrance of the Herrank Warehouse.

The sedan was flipped over. A weak wail came from the inside of the car that was deformed at this point. Within moments, Keith crawled out of the sedan with his face covered in blood. There was a deep cut on his head that was inflicted during the collision...

Moments after that, several vehicles that were trailing after him stopped and had him surrounded. Dozens of Black Knights stepped out and formed a circle around him while Chen Chen also stepped out with a blanket wrapped around himself.

“Cough... You won’t get away, Keith.”

Chen Chen covered his mouth with his pale hands and coughed haggardly. “If you tell me where you hid the information on the AD-001, I might consider letting you live.”

“I won’t tell you, you’re never getting it!”

Keith shook his head insistently, a hint of despair surfaced in his eyes. “I never thought that even Mr. Parker would betray us. It’s a shame that I’ll never fulfill the promise I made with Professor Irwin...”

A flash of annoyance appeared in Chen Chen’s eyes when he saw Keith trying to garner sympathy. Within the next second, Keith suddenly felt his vision turning into a blur. He seemed to catch a glimpse of what appeared to be a card flying toward him that sent him tumbling backward!

From Keith’s perspective, he only felt his body turning light as a feather. He felt himself spinning in circles in the air and as he spun, he caught a glimpse of something baffling. He saw his body along with his feet firmly planted to the ground...

Could it be...

Keith seemed to have realized what was happening but before he could properly process what was happening, his consciousness had faded away rapidly...

“Thump!”

There was a sound of what sounded like a ball dropping on the ground. It was Keith’s head that was sent tumbling away more than twenty meters away!

Keith was dead.

One of the Black Knights walked toward the head of the decapitated Keith. The Black Knight raised its right feet in the air and stomped it down hard on Keith’s head!

With a gruesome splatter, what was once Keith’s brain was turned into a mesh of meat under the Black Knight’s boots!

A large amount of blood and brain particles splattered across the small square in front of the Herrank Warehouse District.

A gentle breeze carried the scent of flesh and blood toward Chen Chen’s direction. He only shook his head ever so slightly as he saw this. Now, he was sure there was no way Keith could be brought back to life, not even with the help of Medpod 3000.

Chen Chen summoned the nano poker card back into his hands and felt another sharp pulse of pain in his head. He knew that this was a result of overuse of Field. He did not expect that even using the graphite poker cards would put this much stress on him.

It was at this point when Little X suddenly alerted, “Sir Godfather, the military is here, they’re behind us!’

As soon as Little X said this, several military helicopters appeared in the sky above and they had their sights aimed at Chen Chen. At the same time, a fleet of military vehicles was quickly approaching from the distance as well!

Hundreds of armed soldiers stepped out of their vehicles as soon as they arrived at the plaza in front of the Herrank Warehouse District and began setting up a defensive formation.

Chen Chen was surrounded!

Chen Chen was surrounded by countless soldiers that covered both the ground and the sky above and cut off all potential exits. Despite all this, Chen Chen seemed unfazed as he proceeded to order, “X, cut off the military satellite and intercept their contact with the headquarters!”

“Understood!”

Little X acted immediately upon receiving the order. Within ten seconds, she spoke again, “I’ve hacked into the military satellite communication system, they won’t be able to restore it within twenty-four hours at least!”

Chen Chen nodded and turned to look at the army in front of him. The soldiers that surrounded him numbered somewhere between seven and eight hundred. At this point, the chief officer in charge got on the roof of a jeep and announced with a megaphone, “Mr. Chen Chen, allow me to introduce myself, I’m Lieutenant Colonel Wilson in charge of the 52nd Battalion of the 3rd Division, part of the Northern American Division Army. I have come today to put you under arrest under charges of direct violation of the ‘Earth Federation-Northern America District Independent Act’ and a range of crimes including open manslaughter, assault on the army, and warmongering. Please surrender immediately and you may receive further leniency in court!”

Had they discovered my identity?

Chen Chen was not even remotely shocked to hear his name coming out of the lieutenant’s lips. His lips curled into a hideous smile as he asked, “So, it’s Lieutenant Wilson. In that case, I suppose Keith entrusted the drug and the USB drive to you?”

“That’s right, my troops received the belongings of the civilian, says that it’s meant to be given to the Northern American government.”

Lieutenant Wilson continued. “This isn’t the time to discuss this. We’ve all witnessed a murder scene. Mr. Chen Chen, do you have anything to say in your defense?”

“No, I killed him, I have nothing to say in defense!”

When Chen Chen heard that the drug was under the army’s possession, he smiled and revealed a row of marbly white teeth. At the same time, he shook his wrist and made a weird, slender metal rod appeared in his hands.

Within the hollow layer of the metal rod, one could faintly make out a bright red fluorescent liquid steadily flowing inside it. There were two buttons attached to the tube, one painted in blue and the other in green.

When Chen Chen clicked the blue button, a jet-black needle head popped out of one end of the metal rod with a swift “swoosh”!

“Alright, Mr. Chen Chen, we’ve recorded everything you’ve just said. Now, we’d like it if you and your subordinates don’t resist our arrest. We’ll hand you over to the investigation department of the Earth Federation after this.”

The lieutenant was mildly surprised to hear Chen Chen admit to his crimes. He felt like he saw the golden hands of fate waving at him and presenting his promotion ahead of him. He immediately gave a signal and sent a group of soldiers to Chen Chen.

Seeing this, Chen Chen no longer hesitated. He raised the metal rod in his hand and stabbed it right into his heart!

Chen Chen felt a chill seeping into his heart. The needle approximately ten centimeters long went all the way into his heart. He proceeded to tap the green button after that!

“Hnnghh...”

There was the sound of liquid pumping as the stark red liquid contained inside the metal container was injected into Chen Chen’s body!

“What are you doing!”

The color drained away from the lieutenant’s face when he saw what Chen Chen did. He seemed to have realized something as he cried out, “Stop him, he’s trying to kill himself!”

The soldiers sped up their advance toward Chen Chen when they heard this. By this point, Chen Chen was trembling all over. His entire body was jolting violently as if some tremendous force within was about to burst at any given moment.

The soldiers gazed in Chen Chen’s direction with an uncertain look between them. What happened after that was something that they would never forget!

They all watched as Chen Chen’s body suddenly enlarged. It started with the sound of fabric being torn apart as Chen Chen’s flesh tore through his coat to reveal another layer of black tights he wore underneath!

Underneath the black tights, Chen Chen’s muscles bulged upward and outward. He started to get down on his knees and curled his body into a ball and soon roared with every ounce of strength he had in his body!

“Ah-!”

Something repeatedly popped and crackled inside Chen Chen amid his howl until a certain point, something started prodding out of his back as if it were trying to burst out of its shell!

“Thump!”

In the end, even the black tights Chen Chen wore was unable to contain his ever-expanding figure anymore. A large mass of bones shot out of Chen Chen’s back and transformed Chen Chen into a spiked beast!

The soldiers halted their steps at the sight of this monstrosity. Their eyes widened with horror and disbelief.

Chen Chen’s transformation was not completed just yet. After his clothes were ripped apart, his figure was still expanding at a rapid pace. At one point, his skin was ripped through and revealed rows of stark red flesh underneath! The torn skin then began regenerating at breakneck speed. However, the skin after healing turned into a light-gray color instead of the regular color of human skin. It was soon replaced with a bony layer that spread all across his body. His body was soon covered with a plated armor of bones!

Chen Chen’s face went through a sharp transformation as well. First, he split his jaws wide open and revealed two rows of densely arranged razor-sharp teeth. The tooth on the furthest end of both rows was especially long and sharp. When he raised his head, they saw that the surface of his skin had also turned into a boned structure. He had turned into what seemed like a skeletal monstrosity!

They all looked on with a mix of horror and amusement as Chen Chen turned into a monster that stood more than three meters tall, weighing more than four hundred kilograms in a matter of seconds!

chapters.title: Chapter 481: Wipe Out
chapters.body:
Chapter 481: Wipe Out

Chapter 481: Wipe Out

“My God...”

A living breathing human being had just transformed before his very eyes — how would he feel?

Lieutenant Colonel Wilson could not describe this feeling. Faced with a scene that could only appear in science fiction movies, at this moment, there was only an endless echo of “F*CK!” in his heart. The group of soldiers sent to apprehend Chen Chen could not help but stop in their tracks. Some even retreated instinctively.

Before everyone’s eyes, Chen Chen, who had turned into a huge monster, slowly stood up. As he breathed, two white streams of mist shot out of his mouth like jet valves. When Chen Chen raised his head, everyone saw that his eyes were like two large black holes and in the center of each black hole, one could even see a pupil the size of a needle tip that burned like coal fire!

Were those the pupils of a human being?

As those pupils swept across the crowd, everyone including Wilson experienced heart palpitations that seemed to come from the depths of their souls. It appeared that now they were not facing a human being at all, but a demon who had crawled out of the abyss of hell!

“What the h*ll are you...”

Finally, Lieutenant Colonel Wilson was the first one to recover. He pointed at Chen Chen again and bit the bullet. “What are you guys doing? Hurry up and apprehend him!”

Hearing Lieutenant Colonel Wilson’s urging, all the soldiers who were supposed to arrest Chen Chen were caught in a dilemma. Nonetheless, a military order must always be obeyed. Just when they were about to grit their teeth and rush forward, Chen Chen suddenly took a step, bent over, and unleashed a rumbling roar!

“Roar!”

Just like a subwoofer, Chen Chen’s roar even created an echo and the soldiers who had charged up were suddenly hit hard by the sound. Their bodies trembled and they fell straight to the ground!

“D*mn...”

Upon seeing this scene, Lieutenant Colonel Wilson’s expression changed. Although Chen Chen was extremely valuable, he also understood that he could not hold back anymore. The atmospheric pressure from a mere roar was enough to injure people. What kind of power was hidden within this devilish body?

Thinking of this, Wilson felt an irrepressible chill in his heart and he no longer hesitated to shout, “Shoot, everyone shoot now!”

At once, the dozens of soldiers at the forefront of the fortification immediately executed his order and pulled the trigger without thinking!

“Rattle rattle rattle...”

A series of gunshots resounded like thunder as endless firepower converged upon Chen Chen’s body at this moment. Then, an even more incredible scene occurred — Chen Chen was only beaten back a few steps. That armor of white bone had blocked the countless bullets, which jingled as they dropped to the ground!

The powerful 7.26 rifle bullet could not even penetrate the shell of the monster in front of them!

“Hahahahaha!!! You know nothing about true power!!!”

In the rain of bullets, Chen Chen laughed wildly, his voice booming like thunder, even overshadowing the snarl of bullets. He suddenly leaned forward and at the same time, his legs bent slightly, and then he sprang up!

“Whoosh!”

There was a sound of something tearing through the air. Everyone only saw a quick blur. Chen Chen’s huge body shot up dozens of meters into the sky!

“How is this possible with such a massive build!”

Such a thought flashed in everyone’s minds. They subconsciously looked into the sky, only to see Chen Chen already appearing above their heads, and with a boom, the front of a military truck was directly squashed by Chen Chen!

“Agh...”

The soldiers nearby screamed. They had just aimed at Chen Chen with their guns, but before they had time to fire, Chen Chen’s arms swung like a pendulum!

“Pfff pfff pfff pfff!”

The two-meter-long barbs on Chen Chen’s elbow were like two sharp sickles. In just one stroke, the soldiers in that area fell to pieces. A large amount of blood and internal organs were flung out, splashing the soldiers behind!

“Agh agh ahh ahh aghh!”

Everyone screamed like they had seen a ghost. Some soldiers no longer cared about avoiding their own teammates and started to pull the trigger frantically!

However, at this time, Chen Chen was like a giant beast in a flock of sheep. He bent his legs again and rushed into another pile of people like a bomb. Then there was another burst of limbs splattering everywhere and four or five soldiers were directly grounded into a pulp!

“Disperse, everyone, disperse immediately!”

The battle commander near the group shouted. All the soldiers screamed and scattered in all directions, but their speed was like a toddler’s compared to Chen Chen who was like an agile cheetah, rushing around in the crowd and killing as he pleased!

“Where’s the sniper? Where’s the grenade platoon? Get them to strike now!”

In the command vehicle, Wilson’s eyes were popping out. He yelled frantically, but the adjutant next to him rushed forward and yelled, “No way, Lieutenant Colonel. He’s among our men now. We don’t dare to fire!”

“Fire, let them fire boldly. We must kill this monster!”

Wilson bellowed while being heavily protected by his guards and he was herded into the command vehicle by the guards.

Wilson’s command vehicle was an infantry fighting vehicle. After seeing this horrible display by Chen Chen, the command vehicle quickly started its engine, preparing to flee into the distance.

“Will you manage to escape?”

Suddenly, after killing dozens of soldiers around him, Chen Chen turned his head. He snarled in a low voice and then suddenly exerted force from his feet, and sprang 20 or 30 meters into the sky!

“Boom!”

In the next second, Chen Chen’s huge body crashed down from a great height and he landed directly in front of the infantry fighting vehicle. His sharp teeth appeared like two sawtooth rows, and at the same time, he half-arched his body, assuming a posture of confrontation!

“Crash!”

There was a massive impact and the infantry fighting vehicle slammed into Chen Chen’s body. Suddenly Chen Chen was hit by the infantry fighting vehicle and driven backward!

However, as he found his balance, Chen Chen suddenly straightened his legs. As the infantry vehicle continued to move forward, Chen Chen’s feet plowed two deep ditches into the ground!

After plowing a ditch of more than ten meters on the road, the infantry fighting vehicle was unexpectedly forced to stop!

At the same time, Chen Chen let out a roar. His arms suddenly exploded with strength. The entire armored vehicle was lifted directly and then it was turned upside down in a raging tumult!

However, just then, there was a flash of fire on a helicopter not far away. Chen Chen had just flipped over the armored vehicle and suddenly felt a jolt in his head. He scratched his head and a deformed warhead with a caliber of more than three centimeters slid off his head and hit the ground with a loud “clank”.

This was the caliber of anti-material sniper rifles!

“Hmm?”

Chen Chen quickly turned his head and looked into the sky. He saw a helicopter hovering at an altitude of thirty to forty meters and then there was another flash of fire from the helicopter!

This time, Chen Chen tilted his head at once and a whistling sound cut by his ear. Another bullet had passed by Chen Chen’s ear and a deep hole with the thickness of a bowl was excavated right behind Chen Chen!

“Little worm, you’ve hurt me!!!”

Provoked by this opponent, Chen Chen could not help but let out a roar and then bent his legs again!

“Oh no!”

On the helicopter, the pilot saw this familiar scene. He suddenly felt a pang of horror and alarm for some reason. Without thinking about it, he started to pull up the helicopter as if he was preparing to avoid the monster’s attack!

Even so, how could the agility of a helicopter compare to that of a creature? In the next second, Chen Chen’s body bounced forth like a cannonball. At this moment, the air seemed to be torn apart, rippling with exploding airwaves!

“Bang!”

Chen Chen’s body slammed into the helicopter. The sniper in the back seat was smashed into a pulp by Chen Chen before he could even react. The airplane further lost its balance, spinning as it fell to the ground...

“Boom!”

The moment the helicopter hit the ground, a huge fireball suddenly rose, but Chen Chen rushed out of the fireball as if nothing had happened. He leaped again and returned to the crowd!

A massacre from hell seemed to have begun...

Wherever Chen Chen passed by, there were corpses all over the ground and severed limbs flying through the air. These soldiers were as fragile as clay and paper. With just a wave of Chen Chen’s hands, several lives were dispelled like the flicker of fireworks, fading away subsequently...

This group of soldiers wanted to flee, but before they got very far, they would be blocked by Chen Chen. Some of those who fled by car were shot and killed directly in the middle of the road. Finally, a few straggling soldiers escaped the Herrank Warehouse District. However, a few distorted transparent figures suddenly appeared in front of them and before they could react, their heads were separated from their bodies!

At this time, the second group of Black Knights sent by Little X had already arrived. Although their numbers were small and they could not join the fight directly, sealing the exit routes and killing any deserters was a piece of cake.

With the incredible marksmanship of the Black Knights, even those high-altitude helicopters were easily killed and one after another fell...

After about ten minutes, the periphery of the Herrank Warehouse District was full of corpses. There were exploded military vehicles and bodies everywhere and flames blazed to the sky, illuminating the fringes of the Herrank Warehouse District.

A soldier with torn legs made a low moan. While looking at a nearby distance, he pulled himself forward with his hands as if he wanted to escape the war zone. Still, in the next second, a pair of claws that was only half his size stretched out, tossed him up high, and then threw him down viciously!

“Splatter!”

There was a sound of bodily fragmentation and at the same time, the scream of the wounded soldier stopped abruptly!

In the flames, more than a dozen translucent figures emerged from the darkness. All of them were wearing black tights that covered their whole body, with strangely shaped weapons in both hands as they looked around blankly.

They walked along as if this was a battlefield in hell. Any soldier who pretended to be dead or unconscious, but who was still breathing, would be shot by them, and then they continued to search for the next life that had not yet been extinguished...

As for Chen Chen, he panted with mist emitting from his mouth while he walked slowly to an overturned tank. He bent over slightly but saw that the hatch of the infantry tank had been opened, and the tank was empty.

“Hmm?”

Chen Chen looked around with charcoal-like pupils and suddenly saw a line of bloodstains and footprints extending into the interior of the Herrank Warehouse District.

“Someone’s slipped through the net?”

Chen Chen murmured in a low voice. He tilted his head while stroking his neck and then strode into the Herrank Warehouse District with dull thudding footsteps...

At this time, on the other side, a soldier was carrying Lieutenant Colonel Wilson and constantly traveling deeper into the Herrank Warehouse District. Another soldier was in charge of guarding the rear. The three of them kept panting and wandering into the depths of the Herrank Warehouse District.

“Pant... Pant...”

Wilson only felt his lungs burning furiously. After the armored car was overturned by Chen Chen, he had hit his chest severely. At this time, he did not know how many of his ribs were broken, so he could only rely on his soldiers to flee.

At this time, he panted while looking behind him, only to see the glare of fires surging into the sky from a distance, and the sound of gunshots that were gradually becoming more sporadic. The battle was over.

“D*mn, what the h*ll was that thing? Why is it invulnerable, with power and speed beyond any lifeform on Earth!”

Wilson growled unhappily, but he was immediately advised by the soldier beside him. “Lieutenant Colonel, now isn’t the time to talk about this. I can’t contact headquarters for some reason, so the most important thing for us is to escape and explain everything to the higher-ups. Otherwise the casualties of this battle today will be covered up by Blacklight Biotechnology!”

Hearing the advice of the soldier, Wilson’s face turned even darker. He was just about to say something when suddenly, there was a loud noise behind him as if something heavy had fallen on the ground!

“Boom!”

Hearing this noise, both of their faces changed. At the same time, the soldier who was responsible for guarding the rear also ran over. “Lieutenant Colonel, that monster is coming over!”

Hearing this confirmation from the soldier, Wilson finally realized that he could not escape. He pushed away the soldier who was supporting him and shouted, “Split up and run. Only in this way will one of us have a chance to escape and expose everything that happened today!”

Hearing Wilson’s order, the two soldiers also understood that he was speaking the truth, so the three of them stopped hesitating. They immediately separated and fled in three directions!

Just ten seconds after the three of them had rushed into the darkness, a huge black shadow suddenly crashed into the ground from the sky. In the smoke and dust, the huge inhuman body slowly straightened up from the ground and looked around. Chen Chen’s keen sense of hearing suddenly picked up three sets of footsteps gradually moving away.

“Little worms, do you think you can escape by splitting up?”

Chen Chen grinned with two rows of fangs. He chuckled lowly, picked a random position, and then leaped forward formidably!

“Boom!”

Just as one of the soldiers had reached a fork in the road, Chen Chen landed directly in front of him. The huge shock wave knocked the soldier to the ground!

Seeing that his escape route was completely blocked, a glint of despair finally appeared in the soldier’s eyes. Before he got up, he raised his gun and aimed a spray of bullets at Chen Chen!

“Rattle rattle!”

There were bursts of intensive gunfire, but before even a third of the bullets had been fired, his body was smashed like a meat patty!

“Splat!”

Chen Chen slowly retracted his palm and glanced at the soldier’s body that had been reduced to only two dimensions. Then he jumped again in the other direction that he had memorized!

A few seconds later, Chen Chen looked at the other corpse that no longer resembled a human being in the palm of his hand, then threw the opponent down like trash. After that, he leaped toward the last position!

“Boom!”

This time, Chen Chen had blocked Wilson directly!

Looking at Wilson, who was backed into a wall, with his eyes wide and round, Chen Chen walked toward the other person step by step. “Run, little worm, why don’t you keep running? Could it be that you have given up?”

Listening to Chen Chen’s mocking, Wilson’s eyes flashed with a sharp glimmer. A hint of joy turned up the corners of his mouth and he laughed uncontrollably. “Hahahaha, monster, no matter what the h*ll you are, it’s all over now. Because you are dead!”

“Oh?”

When Chen Chen heard these words, he paused. His coal-like pupils moved slightly to the right. “Do you mean...”

Before Chen Chen finished speaking, Wilson, who had kept his eyes wide open, suddenly closed his eyes!

In the next second, Chen Chen suddenly felt a chill approaching behind him. Before he could turn his head, he felt a slight tingling in the back of his neck!

“Crack!”

There was a sound as if something was shattered. Wilson opened his eyes immediately after hearing this sound, but then his eyes bulged in sheer disbelief!

Behind the huge monster in front of him, there was a statue with both arms around the monster’s neck. Even so, the monster simply tugged lightly and dragged the angel statue to the front.

“Not bad, it crushed a piece of my exoskeleton.”

Chen Chen touched the split in the carapace at his nape, which then healed swiftly at a visible speed. After a second, the carapace had regained its smoothness as if the crack had just been an illusion.

After he had casually pinched the angel statue into dust, Chen Chen turned his head again to look at Wilson who was stunned. He grinned and uttered in a low voice like a brass bell, “Lieutenant Colonel Wilson, now there’s only you and me...”

chapters.title: Chapter 482: The Law Of Causality
chapters.body:
Chapter 482: The Law Of Causality

Chapter 482: The Law of Causality

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

By the time Chen Chen returned to the battlefield, all the survivors had been cleaned up and even the corpses with gunshot wounds were piled into a tall heap, which was drenched with gasoline, then burned.

Not only that, but also the onlookers who were involved had their memories wiped, forgetting everything they saw. This was replaced by a new memory of the angel statues slaughtering the army.

“Sir Godfather, I’ve already dealt with everything here and I haven’t found any omissions.”

At this moment, Little X’s voice suddenly came from the headset. Although Chen Chen had transformed, his headset was still worn over his ears.

“Good. I’ve also gotten back my things.”

Chen Chen nodded and threw a blue, glowing medicine bottle and a USB flash drive to a Black Knight beside him. At the same time, he looked at the sky and suddenly said:

“Time’s up.”

Following his words, Chen Chen’s body seemed to be deflating and white mist began to pour out. Then the white mist became more dense, even covering Chen Chen’s huge body.

In the next second, Chen Chen’s body shrank rapidly like a deflating ball and the exoskeleton of his entire body directly turned into powder, emitting an unpleasant smell of rot...

When the white mist dissipated again, Chen Chen had regained his previous size. On the surface of his body, there was still a layer of monster skin that was gradually dissolving.

“Sizzle...”

Chen Chen came out of the decaying shell, naked, and he staggered on his feet. Two black knights immediately supported him.

It was only then that they could see that Chen Chen’s body had changed from a muscular body to a skinny frame, just like a severely malnourished refugee who had not eaten for a few years.

Moreover, not only had his body become emaciated, but all the hair on his body had disappeared.

He was like an insect that transformed into a cocoon and turned into a butterfly. At this time, Chen Chen was covered in new skin from top to bottom. This skin was smooth and delicate, as fragile as a baby’s.

However, no outsider would have seen all of this. The Black Knights that had been prepared immediately put on a warm duvet over Chen Chen and then several of them carried Chen Chen into a black car and quickly drove away...

When the car left, the rest of the Black Knights also re-assumed their invisible form, and turned and left the battlefield.

An hour later, Chen Chen returned to the Spire Experimental Base thousands of miles away via the Gantz sphere.

Chen Chen, upon his return to the base, immediately received top-level medical services. Glucose and nutrients were channeled into Chen Chen’s body as if they were free. What Chen Chen had to do was to restore his body. Unlike ordinary people, with Chen Chen’s physique and the medical methods of the Spire Laboratory, it did not take long for Chen Chen to return to his peak state.

...

One day later, Chen Chen woke up hazily in the hospital bed.

He stretched lazily, looked around, and saw that he was now in an intensive care unit. The room was filled with dazzling metal walls. At the same time, there were several bunches of flowers set out before the bed, giving off a hint of fragrance.

The light was not turned on. Still, it was very warm and bright because a shaft of sunlight was shining in from the window. Chen Chen looked toward the source of light and gazed out of the window, and he could even see that outside, there was a huge park with hills and streams. Dozens of visitors walked slowly by, laughing among themselves.

If he kept quiet, Chen Chen could even hear the laughter from the group of visitors and the chirping of birds outside the window.

Seeing this scene, Chen Chen was not surprised because he knew that all this was not real. The so-called scenery outside the window was a kind of 3D holographic image, and the warm sunshine was nothing more than LED light that simulated the real sun.

This kind of light was invented by a genius scientist who was discovered by the Eco Science City. A long time ago, humans had discovered that the natural light they perceived was the diffusion of the interaction between sunlight and other various particles in the air such as nitrogen, oxygen, and carbon dioxide.

Thus, this genius scientist used an LED floodlight to simulate the sun and at the same time, replaced the atmosphere with a layer of nano-material, reconstructing the Earth’s atmosphere over a distance of more than 10 kilometers to obtain a sunlight experience that was close to reality.

At this time, in the scene outside the window, an additional optical system was added to enhance one’s depth perception. When someone stared at the LED light outside the window, no matter from what angle, they would see the sun hanging high in the sky. It could be passed off as the real thing.

Within ten seconds of Chen Chen’s awakening, Little X came in through the door in a white dress. She swaggered to Chen Chen’s bed. “Sir Godfather, you’re awake. Do you need breakfast?”

“Bring it on.”

Chen Chen replied. After the mutation from the G-virus injection, his stomach was already unbearably hungry.

Little X immediately obeyed. Then, she jumped up and sat down on the chair next to Chen Chen’s bed with her legs dangling and gently swaying. “Sir Godfather, there has been news from Northern America that all angel statues have been contained. The situation you were worried about will not happen anymore.”

“I hope so.”

Chen Chen shrugged indifferently. “I’m just afraid that it will leak out again in the future and cause an irreversible human crisis.”

“By the way, Keith’s dead body has been transported back.”

Little X said again, “Moreover, his body has been dissected, but nothing has been found.”

“That’s to be expected. I just had a hunch. If there were any abnormality, it means there was a problem.”

Chen Chen waved his hand.

“Right...”

Little X said dubiously, “A guy who couldn’t be killed by four Black Knights even after being hunted for a day, yet he died so easily in the end. It does feel rather incongruous.”

Chen Chen showed a thoughtful look when he heard these words, and then said, “If my guess is correct, it’s because his ‘mission’ had been completed...”

“Mission?”

Little X blinked with some confusion. “You mean his mission to deliver AD-001?”

“Yes.”

Chen Chen explained patiently to the increasingly anthropomorphic Little X, “You should know that there’s often such a rule in movies, that once someone becomes the protagonist of the story, they will never die before the story ends.

“Everything about the protagonist represents the development of the story. Losing the protagonist means that the story cannot go on. Until the end of the movie, when the protagonist loses the value of advancing the story, then they may die...”

Just when Chen Chen was talking about this, the door of the intensive care unit was opened again. A Black Knight pushed a dining cart in and parked it next to Chen Chen’s bed.

Chen Chen did not hesitate. He first picked up the bucket of milk and drank it in big gulps. After the bucket of milk was emptied, he grabbed the barbecued meat and various high-calorie foods in the dining cart and swallowed them.

While eating, Chen Chen continued to speak, “Remember, in the movie Deadly Crisis: A Shocking Scheme, the movie ends just as the protagonist hands the drug to the other party. This also means that the protagonist isn’t needed to further advance the story, so the protagonist’s plot armor begins to disappear. Since the movie doesn’t say whether the protagonist is dead or alive at the end, then there’s a possibility of him being killed.”

Hearing Chen Chen’s explanation, Little X was a little stunned by the realization. “So that’s it...”

Then, she saw Chen Chen was still frowning, so she asked again, “Then Sir Godfather, why are you still frowning?”

“Because I’m thinking.”

Chen Chen swallowed a piece of butter and then pointed to his head. “I’m thinking about how the USB flash drive interferes with reality and causes the situation in the movie to reoccur in reality. This principle is very important and it may even involve a branch of science that’s more terrifying than memes. No, it may have gone beyond the scientific system and now concerns the field of philosophy...

“Have you determined that the USB flash drive interfered with reality and caused the plot in the movie to happen, rather than the USB flash drive foreseeing the future and then influencing us to make the movie?”

Little X was a little puzzled about Chen Chen’s affirmation.

“Of course!”

Chen Chen replied without hesitation, “X, you know that we’ve obtained AD-001 and we’ve also unlocked the manufacturing process of the drug and can produce this drug at any time. When Osmond’s drug hits the market, we can even sue them for stealing our technology. So, why should I pay so much attention to the drug produced by Osmond?”

“Because AD-001 isn’t important. What’s important is to understand the rules of the USB drive.”

Little X replied.

“Correct.”

Chen Chen affirmed. “The reason I want to kill Keith isn’t to vent my anger nor is it because I’m afraid that he’ll become a dragon-slaying hero... Well, the second thing is a little true, but the most important thing is because I need to test whether I can kill him.

“According to the story of the movie I shot before, when Keith has already delivered the drug to Parker, the film ends. If even after that, I still cannot kill Keith due to various coincidences, then it means one thing — Keith isn’t only the protagonist of the movie, he may also represent a more terrifying identity.

“This identity is difficult to explain, so let’s call it the ‘Dimension’s Child’ for the time being...

“According to the rules of fantasy, the Dimension’s Child represents the will of the world and is loved and favored by heaven and Earth. In that case, he can’t be killed by any method.

“Whereas according to the scientific view, the Dimension’s Child represents the laws of the world. For example, the founding fathers of those unifying dynasties in ancient times. After the great chaos of the world, there must be someone who can calm the troubled times and stabilize the world. This was the law of human society in the Central Plains at that time. Even if the first person fails, there’ll be a second and a third, and there’ll eventually be one person who succeeds...

“When this person is completely successful, just take a look at his life achievements and you’ll see that it’s as if the gods are gaming the system for his sake. He can’t be killed no matter what danger he encounters and he’ll finally succeed in his great cause.”

Having said this, Chen Chen swallowed the last bite of the food, with a look of rejoicing. “It’s just that at the beginning I wasn’t sure whether Keith was such a ‘Dimension’s Child’ or not. It was not until I killed him, that I determined that he... Was not! Because how could the Dimension’s Child be killed by me so easily?

“Since Keith wasn’t the Dimension’s Child, it naturally rules out the speculation of ‘the USB drive foreseeing reality and then influencing us to make the movie’. Then there’s only one conclusion — Keith’s existence and even everything that happened these days, was the result of the USB drive interfering directly with reality.”

“So, that’s it...”

Hearing Chen Chen’s explanation, Little X’s eyes lit up and she finally understood. “In other words, the USB drive is likely to have the power to control cause and effect?”

“That’s right.”

Chen Chen nodded. “In fact, before experiencing this incident, I still had some doubts about whether cause and effect existed. After all, I thought that a person only becomes the Dimension’s Child after having achieved something, not the other way around. But now, I’m certain that cause and effect are likely to exist...”

Speaking of this, Chen Chen’s eyes glowered with anticipation. “It can be said that this is a new ability of the USB flash drive that we’ve discovered after memetics, which is different from conventional science and mysterious memes. Rather, it’s a more obscure, abstract force, and for the time being, we can define it as... The law of causality!”

Hearing Chen Chen’s summary, Little X immediately clapped her hands, revealing a sudden burst of joy. “If you say that, then the USB flash drive’s specific manifestation of causality should be this — once the USB flash drive’s owner takes the initiative to film a movie, it’ll cause the story of the filmed movie to appear in reality, right?”

“There’s another prerequisite, that is, the filmed movie can be recognized by the USB flash drive.”

Chen Chen added. “And it doesn’t necessarily occur in reality. Didn’t you notice that Chronicle 2 didn’t occur in reality? So, when you write the screenplay, it’s best to be as close to the real world as possible...”

“If a movie made by the USB drive holder becomes reality, then as long as we shoot a movie in which Blacklight Biotechnology unifies the world, doesn’t it mean that we’re destined to rule the world?”

Little X asked again.

“We can try, but I don’t hope for much.”

Chen Chen shook his head and smiled bitterly. “You didn’t realize that we filmed more than just Deadly Crisis: A Shocking Scheme. Later, we also filmed science fiction films such as Cancer Man and Immortal. But none of them succeeded. Why is that?

“Combined with everything that has happened in reality today, it’s very possible that Deadly Crisis: A Shocking Scheme can be recognized by the USB flash drive because of the final open ending. Openness implies infinite possibilities and infinite possibilities represent infinite parallel universes. As for the extremely realistic Cancer Man and Immortal, they were discarded because the ending was too fixed.”

“Then, what’s the use of this rule?”

Hearing Chen Chen’s theory, Little X was dumbfounded.

“We can shoot movies to supplement a technology we urgently need, but it’s best not to have any major plot conflicts.”

Chen Chen resolutely said, “This is the experience I’ve learned from this incident. You should notice that to conform to the reoccurrence of the plot in the movie, there were first the angel statues and then the Northern American army. I almost died thanks to all this. All of this was not shown in the movie... This is the ‘backlash’ of the U disk.”

“In other words, this method of filming movies isn’t only a shortcut but also a double-edged sword. If we use it well, things can progress smoothly, but if it’s not used well, human civilization may perish because of it...

“After all, the information that can be presented in a movie is limited. It’s impossible to show everything and the parts that aren’t presented could mean life or death or even more infinite possibilities...”

chapters.title: Chapter 483: The Earth Federation United Front
chapters.body:
Chapter 483: The Earth Federation United Front

Chapter 483: The Earth Federation United Front

However, the evolution of the angel statues was not at an end.

On the contrary, all this was just the beginning of humanity opening a Pandora’s Box.

A few days later, at the Earth Federation headquarters, during the meeting of the Earth Federation United Front, representatives of each continent were sitting in their respective positions. These seats were terraced, curving around the podium, separated by a three-to-four-meter-wide corridor distinctly.

The Earth Federation United Front, a department unknown to 99% of the people in the entire Federation, was one of the many authorities of the Earth Federation. Unlike other departments, it only existed within the Earth Federation itself, not like other Federation departments such as the FBI that had its own branch offices on all continents.

One would only know the name of this department when one was close to the inner core of the power of each continent.

At this time, at the meeting of the Earth Federation United Front, more than a dozen representatives had gathered. These people represented the governments of their respective continents. Although many continents only existed in name such as Africa, Europe, and the Middle East, at least on the surface, these continents still maintained the appropriate level of dignity.

At this time, an old man with gray hair and black-rimmed glasses walked to the front podium as the chairman of the United Front.

The chairmanship of the Earth Federation United Front Conference was held by the member continents of the United Front in turn, based on the English alphabetical order of the continents. The term of each chairman was one month and it was now June. According to the order, the chairman was from the European Continent, Julian Kirsty.

“Ladies and gentlemen, I’m Julian Kirsty, the chairman of the Earth Federation United Front this month. It’s an honor that I once again stand on this rostrum as the representative of our continent.”

Kirsty’s voice was a bit hoarse. He raised his eyes, then lowered his head to read the copy in his hand. “I believe you all know that this United Front emergency meeting held by the Earth Federation is due to an accident that began in the Quantum Laboratory.

“Just three days ago, on the night of 1 June 2020, Northern America suddenly received a warning sent to the White House by hackers, saying that: Los Angeles is undergoing a disaster concerning humanity’s life and death. If it’s not stopped, human civilization will even be destroyed immediately.”

Kirsty raised his head and pushed back his glasses. “I won’t elaborate on the specific details of the warning here, but what I want to emphasize is that at the same time this warning arrives, the Earth Federation’s top-secret — the Quantum Deity Laboratory — also experienced the first major accident since the establishment of the Earth Federation.

“In this accident, 90% of the researchers as well as the ‘shield bearers’ from all continents, died. The total death toll reached 95, among whom were twenty-three ‘shield bearers’ and seventy-five researchers.”

Hearing this momentous news, representatives of all continents immediately whispered, discussing something.

At this moment, the representative of Mainland China suddenly raised his hand, indicating that he needed to speak.

“Do you have anything to ask, Mr. Yu Qi, representative of Mainland China?”

Kirsty asked.

“Excuse me, Mr. Chairman. We all know the death toll of this tragedy and what we’re eager to know now is, what happened in the Quantum Deity Laboratory?”

Yu Qi was a middle-aged man with a resolute face. Although he was questioning the chairman, he looked toward the representative of the Northern American Continent on the opposite side. “Why did this accident happen? Who is responsible for the accident? We have the right to know all this!”

“Of course.”

Kirsty nodded, unsurprised, and he also looked at the representative of the Northern American Continent. “Mr. Nancy, can you tell the whole story now?”

“Yes.”

Hearing this, the representative of Northern America took out a stack of files with a gloomy expression and then asked, “Ladies and gentlemen, my fellow representatives, do you remember the responsibilities of the Earth Federation United Front?

“The United Front, as one of the six major departments of the Earth Federation, is also the centralized department with the most concentrated power and the highest degree of confidentiality. Our duty is very simple, that is, to deal with all human-related predictions forecasted by the quantum computer ‘Adam’. Therefore, it can be said that our department controls the rise and fall of the entire human civilization as well as its security...

“If the famous ‘Federal Bureau of Investigation’ is an internal department that is aimed at ourselves to eliminate internal threats, then our ‘Earth Federation United Front’ is an external department that unites us and targets foreign enemies, including but not limited to aliens, and any ‘abnormal accidents’ that may threaten human civilization. This is the duty of our United Front.”

“So Nancy, you mean...”

Kirsty and everyone in the audience could not help but look over, waiting for the words from the Northern American representative.

“Yes, this accident is considered an ‘abnormal event’ as stipulated by the Earth Federation United Front...”

Nancy replied as he looked around at everyone, “This is the first abnormal event faced by the Earth Federation United Front that could threaten human civilization and it’s also the second abnormal event encountered in Northern America.”

Hearing this, everyone’s expression changed and they whispered to each other again.

These so-called abnormal events referred to events that could threaten human civilization and could not be explained by science. This was stipulated when the Earth Federation was founded. Even the purpose of the quantum computer “Adam” was to deal with the occurrence of such incidents.

It was just that since the creation of the Earth Federation, there had never been such an event and no one knew why the founder of the Earth Federation United Front deliberately came up with such a classification for events.

When everyone heard Nancy’s words at this time, they naturally understood that the reason Nancy said this was the second abnormal event encountered in Northern America was that at the end of last year, there was the “This Man” incident that only occurred in Northern America. This event nearly disrupted the social order in Northern America. Although it finally disappeared, Northern America had always insisted that this incident was a so-called “abnormal event”.

“Is there any evidence?”

Hearing Nancy’s words, Kirsty’s expression could not help turning solemn again.

“Of course there is, but the data I have can’t be compared with what China has.”

However, Nancy suddenly changed his tone and looked at Yu Qi on the opposite side. “I think the representative of Mainland China should know this perfectly well.”

Hearing this sentence, everyone subconsciously looked toward Yu Qi. Yu Qi looked dumbfounded and then frowned. “I gravely object to this! I oppose this contradictory diversion tactic employed by Northern America and we firmly stand against such groundless accusations!”

“Mr. Nancy.”

Kirsty was a little impatient. “All of us sympathize with the accident in your continent, but now isn’t the time to blame each other. At least please tell us what happened.”

Nancy looked a little pacified when he heard these words. He nodded and then said, “In that case, I’ll explain clearly the genesis and development of the event.

“This incident started at 8 o’clock in the evening on 1 June 2020. At that time, the White House was suddenly attacked by hackers. All the White House computers were automatically turned on, displaying a baffling statement.”

The representative of Northern America continued. “This incident alarmed the President, so he came to check on it, surrounded by bodyguards. However, he saw that the statement turned out to be a warning that in the Herrank Warehouse District of Los Angeles in Northern America, a memetic incident is taking place, which may threaten the entire human race. The statement requests the President to order the blockade of the Herrank Warehouse District.”

Hearing this, everyone looked puzzled. Even the White House network could be breached. Did the Northern American network department consist of a bunch of good-for-nothings?

“Not only that.”

Nancy continued to add. “When Mr. President went closer, a little girl’s voice came from the computer. She claimed to be a member of the Blackwatch Corporation and used all kinds of sufficient evidence to get the President to issue an order. This evidence was saved by us and then the President gave the order, half-believing, half-doubting.”

It turned out to be Blackwatch again?

When they heard this, everyone subconsciously looked at Yu Qi, since Blackwatch was an enterprise under China.

Yu Qi also frowned, but he just opened his mouth without interrupting Nancy.

“Next, everything that happened was like a tragedy.”

Nancy’s expression gradually became darker. “After the President issued an order to the Los Angeles City Hall, she was then about to conduct a full investigation into this matter. But she suddenly received news from the Quantum Laboratory, saying that an abnormality had occurred over there, and the quantum computer ‘Adam’ had begun to use encryption to perform data operations!

“Not only that, but before any results were obtained, the Quantum Laboratory lost all contact after half an hour and no one knows what happened.”

Everyone’s eyes widened when they heard this because they already knew that some kind of accident had occurred in the Quantum Laboratory, which caused the deaths of all the representatives, the “shield bearers” of all continents.

This was a massive loss.

“When our troops stationed outside the Quantum Deity Laboratory finally arrived, they only saw the bodies of the researchers and the closed doors and behind the doors, there was...”

At this point, Nancy was silent again and then he laughed coldly. “I’m certain you absolutely won’t believe me. Our soldiers opened the doors and saw a row of angel statues...”

“Angel statues?”

Everyone was a little mystified, not understanding the relationship between the angel statues and the accident.

“I know that it’s difficult for everyone to understand. You don’t know what I’m talking about, so I’ll just say it straight.”

Nancy looked at the doors of the room and then said, “This accident originated in a video that can transform humans into a kind of angel statue and this kind of statue has a terrifying nature. They can...”

“Wait a minute.”

When they heard this, many people could not hold themselves back. Even Kirsty coughed and interrupted the other person. “Mr. Nancy, are you sure that there’s no mistake in your previous sentence? What do you mean the ‘video can transform humans into angel statues’?”

“I mean it literally.”

Nancy said, deadpan, “The content of that video is an angel statue covering its eyes and facing away from the camera. As you blink, you’ll find that the angel statue is constantly moving on the screen as if it wants to move right up to the camera — this is what we found out when we sent a volunteer to conduct an experiment after the accident and he relayed to us the content of the video.”

“So, is he still alive?”

Kirsty immediately grasped the point.

“He was indeed alive at the time, but...”

Nancy shook his head. “We isolated him in a room and monitored him with a camera, but only a few hours later, the camera suddenly stopped functioning. Then we sent someone in, only to find that he had become an angel statue...”

Hearing these words, everyone was in an uproar and they all wore suspicious looks.

“Quiet, everyone, quiet!”

Kirsty shouted immediately, suppressing the noise of everyone in the room.

“I know you must find it a little unbelievable, but I’ll prove it later.”

Nancy could not help but emphasize and then continued. “And this video was originally predicted by the quantum computer, that is, the encrypted data I mentioned just now, so everyone understands why all the ‘shield bearers’ aren’t spared. Right? Because all the shield bearers chose to watch this video after Adam predicted it and they all turned into statues.”

Everyone looked incredulous upon hearing this.

“And these shield-bearers who were turned into statues by that mysterious video... They would lose their lives and become strange kinds of monsters. This kind of monster has a special habit, that is, it will wring the neck of any human who is facing away!”

Nancy continued. “That is to say, the accident in the Quantum Deity Laboratory was caused by the 23 shield-bearers who had turned into angel statues and then slaughtered everyone in the laboratory.”

“Is there any evidence?”

Many representatives asked eagerly without waiting for the chairman to grant them permission to speak.

“Yes, of course there is.”

Nancy nodded. “But we will not release that video because it’s extremely lethal. At the same time, it’s not just videos but even photos and other carriers with images of angel statues can also infect humans and turn them into angel statues. Therefore, any audiovisual evidence needs to be verified through other methods, provided that you can come to Northern America in person.”

Hearing this, Yu Qi could not help but ask, “Then I’d like to ask the representative of Northern America, what does all this have anything to do with Blacklight Biotechnology?”

“Because...”

Nancy said coldly, “Because one of our survivors was in the Quantum Laboratory and witnessed that the legal owner of Blackwatch, Chen Chen, had arrived after the accident!”

chapters.title: Chapter 484: Secret Meeting
chapters.body:
Chapter 484: Secret Meeting

Chapter 484: Secret Meeting

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

“How’s that possible...”

Hearing Nancy’s words, many people once again looked in Yu Qi’s direction and Yu Qi was even more stunned. “That’s impossible. The Quantum Laboratory is the top secret of the Earth Federation. There are only a few thousand higher-ups who know of the lab, which is surrounded by a hundred miles of uninhabited region. How could the legal owner of Blacklight Biotechnology appear there?”

“That’s for China to answer.”

Nancy snorted. “No one knows what happened but the witness did see him. The witness was a shield bearer from Northern America who had just resigned. He was originally going to act as a technical consultant and hand over the position to a new shield bearer. When the disaster happened, he quickly hid in the quantum core area and survived, becoming one of the few survivors in the laboratory.”

Hearing the argument between the two, Kirsty, as the chairman of this month, suddenly looked as if he had a headache. Due to political reasons, he mostly had to maintain the same stance as Northern America. However, this event was too unbelievable which made things difficult for him.

Even so, just as the venue was becoming noisy, there was a knock on the door outside the venue. Kirsty immediately picked up the gavel and banged on the table to make everyone quiet. Then, he saw a soldier in the uniform of the United Front coming in.

As soon as the soldier walked in, he went straight to the rostrum, and then he said something into Kirsty’s ears. Kirsty looked at the soldier with a look of astonishment when he heard the words and then looked outside the door again. Then he said, “Today’s emergency meeting has temporarily ended. Alright, meeting adjourned!”

With that, he banged the gavel again, shot a meaningful glance at Nancy, then turned hurriedly and left the venue.

Seeing Kirsty suddenly leave, everyone was even more astounded. For a while, the place was in chaos. Many people gathered together and discussed in whispers the precious information that they had just heard.

Seeing that Kirsty had left in a hurry, Nancy seemed to think of something. He glanced at Yu Qi who was opposite, then followed Kirsty out and disappeared outside the door of the conference room.

Seeing these two people leave in such a sneaky manner, Yu Qi’s expression was stormy and uncertain. After all, before he was suddenly attacked, his superiors had given him no warning and he was completely ignorant of all this.

Moreover, although the various continents of the Earth Federation were frequently in lively conflict, in the United Front, there were not many instances of slander or defamation. Even if they had wanted to make a scapegoat out of China, they would not have picked such a lousy story.

Did this mean that Blacklight Biotechnology was involved in this matter?

Thinking of this, Yu Qi’s heart also trembled in shock.

He was secretly rather opposed to the sudden rise of Blacklight Biotechnology. As a politician, he had the natural instinct of every politician, which was to control everything in his hands and maintain stability, without any unexpected situations.

Civilization needed stability, thus the Earth Federation existed.

The country needed stability, thus the army and nuclear weapons existed.

The people needed stability, thus the law existed...

However, the existence of Blacklight Biotechnology had broken this stability.

All the continents were well aware of what this company had done in Africa — starting from the construction of the nuclear power plant four years ago. Then, based on the unique advantages brought by the nuclear power plant, an entire city was built. At the same time, the company vigorously developed the industry system, tying the entire country’s population to its own chariot of interests.

It took the people of the entire country as hostages and bit by bit turned the government of this country into a mere figurehead.

By now, how many rights did Namibia have to itself?

In addition, looting all kinds of rare resources in Africa in the form of transactions was also the company’s specialty. It even secretly subsidized the rebels to launch a coup to obtain germanium mines from a small country until the germanium mines had completely fallen into its pockets.

Originally, this kind of company should have been dismantled by the Earth Federation’s sanctions a long time ago and its legal owner should be sent to the Federal International Court of Justice. Nonetheless, this company had enticed countless European and American consortia into joining its forces with its ultra-advanced biotechnology, instantly turning the enemy into an ally, eliminating 80% of the resistance.

Strictly speaking, these tactics were not that outstanding. It was not that other companies had never thought of doing all this, but those companies were a long way from the level of Blacklight Biotechnology in terms of technology.

As early as the beginning of this year, the Earth Federation had analyzed the biotechnology of Blacklight Biotechnology. Many experts believed that the level of biotechnology currently possessed by Blacklight Biotechnology had exceeded that of the Earth Federation by more than 50 years...

Blacklight Biotechnology had raised the level of biotechnology in the Earth Federation and even caused the entire human society to feel the impact of their biotechnology.

However, this was a beneficial thing for the entire humankind after all. Governments of all countries could only put up with this, half in agony, half in delight. In addition, the company was not monopolizing these technologies but was willing to sell them to all continents, which was why Blacklight Biotechnology could keep growing until it became the mammoth it was today.

Otherwise, the Earth Federation would simply charge this company with illegal monopoly or war crimes, which would force it to face the consequences of its actions.

Even so, later, this company acted fishier. First, the company suddenly broke out of its field and entered the electronics industry and even unveiled the black technology of holographic projection and brainwave control. After that, the gloves were off. The company began to get involved in the military industry and aerospace.

At this point, the Northern American Continent finally could not sit still and began planning to create conflicts to act against Blacklight Biotechnology.

What happened next was known to everyone. Blacklight Biotechnology was suspected of controlling a certain secret weapon, which once disrupted the normal social order in Northern America and eventually caused society to stop moving.

At this moment, a thought occurred to Yu Qi — everyone here was responsible for how powerful Blacklight Biotechnology had become.

He shook his head, walked out of the United Front conference room behind everyone else, and retrieved his mobile phone at the entrance.

Then he saw that the notification light of his mobile phone was green.

He instinctively turned on the phone and as expected, there was a caller ID, but when he saw the label of the caller ID, he felt a quick jolt.

The one who called him turned out to be his immediate superior!

Although Yu Qi was a representative of China in the Earth Federation United Front, he was not the top leader of China in this department. He was not even in the top three in command. He was equivalent to a spokesperson. The group’s direction was determined by the big shot behind all of them.

Without thinking, Yu Qi cleared his throat quickly and then immediately pressed the callback button.

The call was swiftly connected after only a brief beeping sound.

“Secretary Lin, were you looking for me?”

Yu Qi returned to using Chinese and spoke in clear syllables, “I was about to report to you that a major event has occurred in the Quantum Deity Laboratory, which is suspected to be related to the company Blacklight Biotechnology...”

“I already know.”

On the phone, the other party’s voice calmly said, “Now, head out of the conference room and come meet me in front of Door C in Hall 1.”

“Ah, Secretary Lin, have you come to the Earth Federation headquarters?”

Yu Qi was immediately stunned. It was no ordinary matter for Secretary Lin, who had always been so busy, to come to the Earth Federation headquarters in Switzerland. After all, as a leader at the continental level, every move would arouse endless suspicion. Moreover, the security of these leading figures was of utmost priority. Everything they did would cause a ripple effect.

Still, in the next second, Yu Qi knew that he had asked the wrong question. He did not wait for the other person to answer and said quickly, “I understand, I’ll come over right away!”

Then, Yu Qi hung up the phone.

He kept walking toward Hall 1, but he saw Nancy and Kirsty also walking in front of him. Based on their hurried footsteps, they seemed to be preparing to meet some big shots as well.

Yu Qi was even more puzzled. He followed them to Hall 1. However, at this moment, Nancy and Kirsty suddenly separated in front of him and walked in the direction of Door A and Door B respectively.

Those two directions were also the entrances of Hall 1, just like the terminals of an airport. To better receive travelers, the airport had multiple terminals to welcome passengers from all over the world and the same was true with Hall 1. To welcome the leaders of various countries and prevent two parties from meeting awkwardly at the entrance, every time the higher-ups of the countries arrived at the Earth Federation, they would be diverted through various entrances.

Seeing this scene, Yu Qi was stunned. Sure enough, not only his immediate superior but also the big bosses of Nancy and Kirsty had come...

It seemed that the Earth Federation was going through something extraordinary...

Thinking of this, Yu Qi no longer paid attention to the whereabouts of the two. He directly followed the route to the entrance of Door C.

Suddenly, Yu Qi saw a group of guards with real swords and guns walking out of a car, surrounding his immediate superior.

“Sec, Secretary Lin!”

Yu Qi hurriedly rushed forward, about to shake hands with the other man, but the old man called Secretary Lin just waved his hand and at the same time stepped aside.

At this point, Yu Qi realized that there was another person behind Secretary Lin!

He was a refined-looking man, about sixty years old, with swept-back hair that was meticulously combed. At this time, he was smiling and walking toward Yu Qi.

When Yu Qi saw this man’s face clearly, his head suddenly buzzed and his brain totally crashed!

“Comrade Little Yu, thank you for your hard work here.”

Seeing Yu Qi’s expression, the man could not help but smile lightly and at the same time, stretched out his hand toward Yu Qi.

Yu Qi was an elite after all. After seeing the man speaking to him, he immediately recovered from his daze. He grasped the man’s hand with both hands and said excitedly, “It’s not hard, it’s not hard at all!”

Seeing this, the man smiled kindly and then walked toward the inside of the hall, surrounded by guards.

“Little Yu, let’s go too.”

Behind him, Secretary Lin patted Yu Qi on the shoulder and exhorted, “You’re our representative in the Earth Federation United Front. You have many years of diplomatic experience and are outstanding in terms of work ability. Therefore, the leader called for you to participate in this important meeting.”
